数学错题本

数学错题本

题目格式:

澄潇于数学大观

函数极限连续

(26 版 660 数二第 509 题) 下列命题正确的是
(A) 设 lim⁡x→x0f(x)\lim\limits_{x \to x_0}{f(x)}x→x0​lim​f(x) 存在, 则必存在 δ>0\delta \gt 0δ>0, 当 x∈U˚δ(x0)x \in \mathring{U}_\delta (x_0)x∈U˚δ​(x0​) 时, f(x)f(x)f(x) 必存在
(B) 设 f(x)f(x)f(x) 在 x=x0x = x_0x=x0​ 处连续, 则必存在 δ>0\delta \gt 0δ>0, 当 x∈U˚δ(x0)x \in \mathring{U}_\delta (x_0)x∈U˚δ​(x0​) 时, f(x)f(x)f(x) 亦连续
© 设 x=x0x = x_0x=x0​ 为 f(x)f(x)f(x) 的间断点, 则 lim⁡x→x0f(x)\lim\limits_{x \to x_0}{f(x)}x→x0​lim​f(x) 必不存在
(D) 设 f(x0)f(x_0)f(x0​) 不存在, 则 lim⁡x→x0f(x)\lim\limits_{x \to x_0}{f(x)}x→x0​lim​f(x) 必不存在

答案(A)

(姜晓千真题同源 150) 设 f(x)f(x)f(x) 为以 TTT 为周期的连续函数, 则下列结论正确的个数是
(1) ∫0xf(t)dt\int_{0}^{x}{f(t)\mathrm{d}t}∫0x​f(t)dt 以 TTT 为周期
(2) ∫0xf(t)dt−xT∫0Tf(t)dt\int_{0}^{x}{f(t)\mathrm{d}t}-\dfrac{x}{T}\int_{0}^{T}{f(t)\mathrm{d}t}∫0x​f(t)dt−Tx​∫0T​f(t)dt 以 TTT 为周期
(3) 若 f(x)f(x)f(x) 为奇函数, 则 ∫0xf(t)dt\int_{0}^{x}{f(t)\mathrm{d}t}∫0x​f(t)dt 以 TTT 为周期
(4) ∫0x[f(t)−f(−t)]dt\int_{0}^{x}{\left[ f(t)-f(-t) \right]\mathrm{d}t}∫0x​[f(t)−f(−t)]dt 以 TTT 为周期
(5) 若 ∫0+∞f(x)dx\int_{0}^{+\infty}{f(x)\mathrm{d}x}∫0+∞​f(x)dx 收敛, 则 ∫0xf(t)dt\int_{0}^{x}{f(t)\mathrm{d}t}∫0x​f(t)dt 以 TTT 为周期
(A) 1 (B) 2 © 3 (D) 4

答案(D). 对于 (1), ∫0xf(t)dt\int_{0}^{x}{f(t)\mathrm{d}t}∫0x​f(t)dt 以 TTT 为周期   ⟺  \iff⟺ ∫0Tf(x)dx=0\int_{0}^{T}{f(x)\mathrm{d}x}=0∫0T​f(x)dx=0

(1997 数一) lim⁡x→03sin⁡x+x2cos⁡1x(1+cos⁡x)ln⁡(1+x)\lim\limits_{x \to 0}{\dfrac{3\sin{x}+x^2\cos{\dfrac{1}{x}}}{(1+\cos{x})\ln{(1+x)}}}x→0lim​(1+cosx)ln(1+x)3sinx+x2cosx1​​

答案 32\dfrac{3}{2}23​

(1998 数一二) lim⁡x→01+x+1−x−2x2\lim\limits_{x \to 0}{\dfrac{\sqrt{1+x}+\sqrt{1-x}-2}{x^2}}x→0lim​x21+x​+1−x​−2​

答案 −14-\dfrac{1}{4}−41​

(2001 数二) lim⁡x→13−x−1+xx2+x−2\lim\limits_{x \to 1}{\dfrac{\sqrt{3-x}-\sqrt{1+x}}{x^2+x-2}}x→1lim​x2+x−23−x​−1+x​​

答案 −26-\dfrac{\sqrt{2}}{6}−62​​

(2002 数二) 设 y=y(x)y=y(x)y=y(x) 是二阶常系数微分方程 y′′+py′+qy=e3xy''+py'+qy=e^{3x}y′′+py′+qy=e3x 满足初始条件 y(0)=y′(0)=0y(0)=y'(0)=0y(0)=y′(0)=0 的特解, 则当 x→0x \to 0x→0 时, 函数 ln⁡(1+x2)y(x)\dfrac{\ln{(1+x^2)}}{y(x)}y(x)ln(1+x2)​ 的极限
(A) 不存在 (B) 等于 1 © 等于 2 (D) 等于 3

答案©

(2009 数三) lim⁡x→0e−ecos⁡x1+x23−1\lim\limits_{x \to 0}{\dfrac{e-e^{\cos{x}}}{\sqrt[3]{1+x^2}-1}}x→0lim​31+x2​−1e−ecosx​

答案 3e2\dfrac{3e}{2}23e​

(1997 数二) lim⁡x→−∞4x2+x−1+x+1x2+sin⁡x\lim\limits_{x \to -\infty}{\dfrac{\sqrt{4x^2+x-1}+x+1}{\sqrt{x^2+\sin{x}}}}x→−∞lim​x2+sinx​4x2+x−1​+x+1​

答案1

(2004 数三) lim⁡x→0(1sin⁡2x−cos⁡2xx2)\lim\limits_{x \to 0}{\left( \dfrac{1}{\sin^2{x}}-\dfrac{\cos^2{x}}{x^2} \right)}x→0lim​(sin2x1​−x2cos2x​)

答案 43\dfrac{4}{3}34​

(1987 数二) 设 f(x)f(x)f(x) 在 x=ax=ax=a 处可导, 则 lim⁡x→0f(a+x)−f(a−x)x\lim\limits_{x \to 0}{\dfrac{f(a+x)-f(a-x)}{x}}x→0lim​xf(a+x)−f(a−x)​ 等于
(A) f′(a)f'(a)f′(a) (B) 2f′(a)2f'(a)2f′(a) © 000 (D) f′(2a)f'(2a)f′(2a)

答案(B)

(2005 数二) 设函数 f(x)f(x)f(x) 连续, 且 f(0)≠0f(0) \ne 0f(0)=0, 求极限 lim⁡x→0∫0x(x−t)f(t)dtx∫0xf(x−t)dt\lim\limits_{x \to 0}{\dfrac{\int_0^x{(x-t)f(t)\mathrm{d}t}}{x\int_0^x{f(x-t)\mathrm{d}t}}}x→0lim​x∫0x​f(x−t)dt∫0x​(x−t)f(t)dt​

答案 12\dfrac{1}{2}21​

(2013 数二) 设函数 f(x)=ln⁡x+1xf(x)=\ln{x}+\dfrac{1}{x}f(x)=lnx+x1​
(I) 求 f(x)f(x)f(x) 的最小值
(II) 设数列 {xn}\{ x_n \}{xn​} 满足 ln⁡xn+1xn+1<1\ln{x_n}+\dfrac{1}{x_{n+1}} \lt 1lnxn​+xn+1​1​<1, 证明 lim⁡n→∞xn\lim\limits_{n \to \infty}{x_n}n→∞lim​xn​ 存在, 并求此极限

答案(I) f(1)=1f(1)=1f(1)=1
(II) 由题得 f(xn)=lnxn+1xn≥1>lnxn+1xn+1f(x_n)=ln{x_n}+\dfrac{1}{x_n} \ge 1 \gt ln{x_n}+\dfrac{1}{x_{n+1}}f(xn​)=lnxn​+xn​1​≥1>lnxn​+xn+1​1​, 故 1xn>1xn+1\dfrac{1}{x_n} \gt \dfrac{1}{x_{n+1}}xn​1​>xn+1​1​, 由题知 {xn}\{ x_n \}{xn​} 为正项数列, 可知 xn<xn+1x_n \lt x_{n+1}xn​<xn+1​, 即单调增加. 由 ln⁡xn+1xn+1<1\ln{x_n}+\dfrac{1}{x_{n+1}} \lt 1lnxn​+xn+1​1​<1 得 ln⁡xn<1−1xn+1\ln{x_n} \lt 1 - \dfrac{1}{x_{n+1}}lnxn​<1−xn+1​1​, 即 xn<exp⁡(1−1xn+1)<ex_n \lt \exp{\left( 1-\dfrac{1}{x_{n+1}} \right)} \lt exn​<exp(1−xn+1​1​)<e, 故 xn{x_n}xn​ 单调增加且有上界, 极限存在, 通过对不等式两端取极限可得 lim⁡n→∞xn=1\lim\limits_{n \to \infty}{x_n}=1n→∞lim​xn​=1

(2018 数一二三) 设数列 {xn}\{ x_n \}{xn​} 满足 x1>0x_1 \gt 0x1​>0, xnexn+1=exn−1(n=1,2,⋯ )x_ne^{x_{n+1}}=e^{x_n}-1 (n=1,2,\cdots)xn​exn+1​=exn​−1(n=1,2,⋯). 证明 {xn}\{ x_n \}{xn​} 收敛, 并求 lim⁡n→∞xn\lim\limits_{n \to \infty}{x_n}n→∞lim​xn​

答案由题得 xn+1=ln⁡(exn−1xn)x_{n+1}=\ln{\left( \dfrac{e^{x_n}-1}{x_n} \right)}xn+1​=ln(xn​exn​−1​). 先用数学归纳法证明 xn>0x_n \gt 0xn​>0. 首先 x1>0x_1 \gt 0x1​>0, 假设 n=kn=kn=k 时 xk>0x_k \gt 0xk​>0, 当 x>0x \gt 0x>0 时有 ex−1x>1\dfrac{e^x-1}{x} \gt 1xex−1​>1, 于是 xk+1=ln⁡(exk−1xk)>ln1=0x_{k+1}=\ln{\left( \dfrac{e^{x_k}-1}{x_k} \right)} \gt ln{1} = 0xk+1​=ln(xk​exk​−1​)>ln1=0, 因此 {xn}\{ x_n \}{xn​} 有下界大于 0. 接下来可通过对等式 exn+1=exn−e0xn−0e^{x_{n+1}}=\dfrac{e^{x_n}-e^0}{x_n-0}exn+1​=xn​−0exn​−e0​ 使用拉格朗日中值定理或对等式 xn+1−xn=ln⁡(exn−1xnexn)x_{n+1}-x_n=\ln{\left( \dfrac{e^{x_n}-1}{x_ne^{x_n}} \right)}xn+1​−xn​=ln(xn​exn​exn​−1​) 进行函数求导讨论可得数列单调减少, 然后通过对等式两端求极限可得 lim⁡n→∞xn=0\lim\limits_{n \to \infty}{x_n}=0n→∞lim​xn​=0

(2012 数二) 设 an>0(n=1,2,⋯ )a_n \gt 0 (n=1,2,\cdots)an​>0(n=1,2,⋯), Sn=a1+a2+⋯+anS_n=a_1+a_2+ \cdots +a_nSn​=a1​+a2​+⋯+an​, 则数列 {Sn}\{ S_n \}{Sn​} 有界是数列 {an}\{ a_n \}{an​} 收敛的
(A) 充分必要条件
(B) 充分非必要条件
© 必要非充分条件
(D) 既非充分也非必要条件

答案(B)

(2008 数一二) 设函数 f(x)f(x)f(x) 在 (−∞,+∞)\left(-\infty, +\infty \right)(−∞,+∞) 内单调有界, {xn}\{ x_n \}{xn​} 为数列, 下列命题正确的是
(A) 若 {xn}\{ x_n \}{xn​} 收敛, 则 {f(xn)}\{ f(x_n) \}{f(xn​)} 收敛
(B) 若 {xn}\{ x_n \}{xn​} 单调, 则 {f(xn)}\{ f(x_n) \}{f(xn​)} 收敛
© 若 {f(xn)}\{ f(x_n) \}{f(xn​)} 收敛, 则 {xn}\{ x_n \}{xn​} 收敛
(D) 若 {f(xn)}\{ f(x_n) \}{f(xn​)} 单调, 则 {xn}\{ x_n \}{xn​} 收敛

答案(B)

(2022 数一二) 设数列 {xn}\{x_n\}{xn​} 满足 −π2≤xn≤π2-\dfrac{\pi}{2} \le x_n \le \dfrac{\pi}{2}−2π​≤xn​≤2π​, 则
(A) 若 lim⁡n→∞cos⁡(sin⁡xn)\lim\limits_{n \to \infty} \cos(\sin x_n)n→∞lim​cos(sinxn​) 存在, 则 lim⁡n→∞xn\lim\limits_{n \to \infty} x_nn→∞lim​xn​ 存在
(B) 若 lim⁡n→∞sin⁡(cos⁡xn)\lim\limits_{n \to \infty} \sin(\cos x_n)n→∞lim​sin(cosxn​) 存在, 则 lim⁡n→∞xn\lim\limits_{n \to \infty} x_nn→∞lim​xn​ 存在
© 若 lim⁡n→∞cos⁡(sin⁡xn)\lim\limits_{n \to \infty} \cos(\sin x_n)n→∞lim​cos(sinxn​) 存在, 则 lim⁡n→∞sin⁡xn\lim\limits_{n \to \infty} \sin x_nn→∞lim​sinxn​ 存在, 但 lim⁡n→∞xn\lim\limits_{n \to \infty} x_nn→∞lim​xn​ 不一定存在
(D) 若 lim⁡n→∞sin⁡(cos⁡xn)\lim\limits_{n \to \infty} \sin(\cos x_n)n→∞lim​sin(cosxn​) 存在, 则 lim⁡n→∞cos⁡xn\lim\limits_{n \to \infty} \cos x_nn→∞lim​cosxn​ 存在, 但 lim⁡n→∞xn\lim\limits_{n \to \infty} x_nn→∞lim​xn​ 不一定存在

答案(D)

(2022 数三) 已知 an=nn−(−1)nna_n = \sqrt[n]{n} - \dfrac{(-1)^n}{n}an​=nn​−n(−1)n​ (n=1,2,⋯n=1,2,\cdotsn=1,2,⋯), 则 {an}\{a_n\}{an​}
(A) 有最大值, 有最小值
(B) 有最大值, 没有最小值
© 没有最大值, 有最小值
(D) 没有最大值, 没有最小值

答案(A)

(2023 数二) 已知 {xn},{yn}\{x_n\}, \{y_n\}{xn​},{yn​} 满足: x1=y1=12,xn+1=sin⁡xn,yn+1=yn2x_1 = y_1 = \dfrac{1}{2}, x_{n+1} = \sin x_n, y_{n+1} = y_n^2x1​=y1​=21​,xn+1​=sinxn​,yn+1​=yn2​ (n=1,2,⋯n=1,2,\cdotsn=1,2,⋯), 则当 n→∞n \to \inftyn→∞ 时
(A) xnx_nxn​ 是 yny_nyn​ 的高阶无穷小
(B) yny_nyn​ 是 xnx_nxn​ 的高阶无穷小
© xnx_nxn​ 与 yny_nyn​ 是等价无穷小
(D) xnx_nxn​ 与 yny_nyn​ 是同阶但不等价的无穷小

答案(B)

(1999 数二) 设 f(x)f(x)f(x) 是区间 [0,+∞)[0, +\infty)[0,+∞) 上单调减少且非负的连续函数, an=∑k=1nf(k)−∫1nf(x)dx(n=1,2,⋯ )a_n = \sum\limits_{k=1}^{n} f(k) - \int_{1}^{n} f(x) \mathrm{d}x (n=1, 2, \cdots)an​=k=1∑n​f(k)−∫1n​f(x)dx(n=1,2,⋯), 证明数列 {an}\{a_n\}{an​} 的极限存在

答案an=∑k=1nf(k)−∑k=1n−1∫kk+1f(x)dx=∑k=1n[f(k)−∫kk+1f(x)dx]+∫nn+1f(x)dxa_n = \sum\limits_{k=1}^{n} f(k) - \sum\limits_{k=1}^{n-1} \int_{k}^{k+1} f(x) \mathrm{d}x = \sum\limits_{k=1}^{n} \left[ f(k) - \int_{k}^{k+1} f(x) \mathrm{d}x \right] + \int_n^{n+1}{f(x)\mathrm{d}x}an​=k=1∑n​f(k)−k=1∑n−1​∫kk+1​f(x)dx=k=1∑n​[f(k)−∫kk+1​f(x)dx]+∫nn+1​f(x)dx (1). 由于 f(x)f(x)f(x) 单调减少, 所以 f(k+1)=∫kk+1f(k+1)dx⩽∫kk+1f(x)dx⩽∫kk+1f(k)dx=f(k)f(k+1) = \int_{k}^{k+1} f(k+1) \mathrm{d}x \leqslant \int_{k}^{k+1} f(x) \mathrm{d}x \leqslant \int_{k}^{k+1} f(k) \mathrm{d}x = f(k)f(k+1)=∫kk+1​f(k+1)dx⩽∫kk+1​f(x)dx⩽∫kk+1​f(k)dx=f(k), 故 an+1−an=∑k=1n+1f(k)−∑k=1nf(k)−∫1n+1f(x)dx+∫1nf(x)dx=f(n+1)−∫nn+1f(x)dx⩽0a_{n+1} - a_n = \sum\limits_{k=1}^{n+1} f(k) - \sum\limits_{k=1}^{n} f(k) - \int_{1}^{n+1} f(x) \mathrm{d}x + \int_{1}^{n} f(x) \mathrm{d}x = f(n+1) - \int_{n}^{n+1} f(x) \mathrm{d}x \leqslant 0an+1​−an​=k=1∑n+1​f(k)−k=1∑n​f(k)−∫1n+1​f(x)dx+∫1n​f(x)dx=f(n+1)−∫nn+1​f(x)dx⩽0, 所以 {an}\{a_n\}{an​} 单调减少. 又由 (1) 式知 f(k)−∫kk+1f(x)dx⩾0,∫nn+1f(x)dx⩾0f(k) - \int_{k}^{k+1} f(x) \mathrm{d}x \geqslant 0, \int_{n}^{n+1} f(x) \mathrm{d}x \geqslant 0f(k)−∫kk+1​f(x)dx⩾0,∫nn+1​f(x)dx⩾0, 故 {an}\{a_n\}{an​} 有下界 000. 再由单调有界准则, 知 lim⁡n→∞an\lim\limits_{n \to \infty} a_nn→∞lim​an​ 存在.

(1994 数一) 设 lim⁡x→0atan⁡x+b(1−cos⁡x)cln⁡(1−2x)+d(1−e−x2)=2\lim\limits_{x \to 0} \dfrac{a \tan x + b(1 - \cos x)}{c \ln(1 - 2x) + d(1 - e^{-x^2})} = 2x→0lim​cln(1−2x)+d(1−e−x2)atanx+b(1−cosx)​=2, 其中 a2+c2≠0a^2 + c^2 \neq 0a2+c2=0, 则必有
(A) b=4db = 4db=4d
(B) b=−4db = -4db=−4d
© a=4ca = 4ca=4c
(D) a=−4ca = -4ca=−4c

答案(D)

(2010 数三) 若 lim⁡x→0[1x−(1x−a)ex]=1\lim\limits_{x \to 0}\left[\dfrac{1}{x} - \left(\dfrac{1}{x} - a\right)e^x\right] = 1x→0lim​[x1​−(x1​−a)ex]=1, 则 aaa 等于
(A) 000
(B) 111
© 222
(D) 333

答案©

(2011 数二) 已知函数 F(x)=∫0xln⁡(1+t2)dtxαF(x) = \dfrac{\int_{0}^{x} \ln\left(1 + t^2\right) \mathrm{d}t}{x^\alpha}F(x)=xα∫0x​ln(1+t2)dt​. 设 lim⁡x→+∞F(x)=lim⁡x→0+F(x)=0\lim\limits_{x \to +\infty} F(x) = \lim\limits_{x \to 0^+} F(x) = 0x→+∞lim​F(x)=x→0+lim​F(x)=0, 试求 α\alphaα 的取值范围

答案记 f(x)=∫0xln⁡(1+t2)dtf(x) = \int_{0}^{x} \ln(1 + t^2) \mathrm{d}tf(x)=∫0x​ln(1+t2)dt, 则 F(x)=f(x)xαF(x) = \dfrac{f(x)}{x^\alpha}F(x)=xαf(x)​. 可以看出, lim⁡x→0+f(x)=0\lim\limits_{x \to 0^+} f(x) = 0x→0+lim​f(x)=0, lim⁡x→+∞f(x)=+∞\lim\limits_{x \to +\infty} f(x) = +\inftyx→+∞lim​f(x)=+∞. (1) x→+∞x \to +\inftyx→+∞ 时的情形. 当 α≤0\alpha \le 0α≤0 时, lim⁡x→+∞f(x)xα=+∞\lim\limits_{x \to +\infty} \dfrac{f(x)}{x^\alpha} = +\inftyx→+∞lim​xαf(x)​=+∞. 当 α>0\alpha > 0α>0 时, lim⁡x→+∞f(x)xα\lim\limits_{x \to +\infty} \dfrac{f(x)}{x^\alpha}x→+∞lim​xαf(x)​ 为 ∞∞\dfrac{\infty}{\infty}∞∞​ 型未定式. lim⁡x→+∞f(x)xα=洛必达lim⁡x→+∞ln⁡(1+x2)αxα−1\lim\limits_{x \to +\infty} \dfrac{f(x)}{x^\alpha} \xlongequal{\text{洛必达}} \lim\limits_{x \to +\infty} \dfrac{\ln(1 + x^2)}{\alpha x^{\alpha-1}}x→+∞lim​xαf(x)​洛必达x→+∞lim​αxα−1ln(1+x2)​. 当 0<α≤10 < \alpha \le 10<α≤1 时, lim⁡x→+∞ln⁡(1+x2)αxα−1=+∞\lim\limits_{x \to +\infty} \dfrac{\ln(1 + x^2)}{\alpha x^{\alpha-1}} = +\inftyx→+∞lim​αxα−1ln(1+x2)​=+∞. 当 α>1\alpha > 1α>1 时, lim⁡x→+∞ln⁡(1+x2)αxα−1\lim\limits_{x \to +\infty} \dfrac{\ln(1 + x^2)}{\alpha x^{\alpha-1}}x→+∞lim​αxα−1ln(1+x2)​ 为 ∞∞\dfrac{\infty}{\infty}∞∞​ 型未定式, 继续使用洛必达法则得 lim⁡x→+∞ln⁡(1+x2)αxα−1=洛必达lim⁡x→+∞2xx2+1α(α−1)xα−2=lim⁡x→+∞2xα(α−1)(x2+1)xα−3=lim⁡x→+∞2α(α−1)xα−1(1+1x2)=lim⁡x→+∞2α(α−1)xα−1=0\lim\limits_{x \to +\infty} \dfrac{\ln(1 + x^2)}{\alpha x^{\alpha-1}} \xlongequal{\text{洛必达}} \lim\limits_{x \to +\infty} \dfrac{\dfrac{2x}{x^2 + 1}}{\alpha(\alpha - 1)x^{\alpha-2}} = \lim\limits_{x \to +\infty} \dfrac{2x}{\alpha(\alpha - 1)(x^2 + 1)x^{\alpha-3}} = \lim\limits_{x \to +\infty} \dfrac{2}{\alpha(\alpha - 1)x^{\alpha-1}\left(1 + \dfrac{1}{x^2}\right)} = \lim\limits_{x \to +\infty} \dfrac{2}{\alpha(\alpha - 1)x^{\alpha-1}} = 0x→+∞lim​αxα−1ln(1+x2)​洛必达x→+∞lim​α(α−1)xα−2x2+12x​​=x→+∞lim​α(α−1)(x2+1)xα−32x​=x→+∞lim​α(α−1)xα−1(1+x21​)2​=x→+∞lim​α(α−1)xα−12​=0. 因此, 当 α>1\alpha > 1α>1 时, lim⁡x→+∞f(x)xα=0\lim\limits_{x \to +\infty} \dfrac{f(x)}{x^\alpha} = 0x→+∞lim​xαf(x)​=0. (2) x→0+x \to 0^+x→0+ 时的情形. 当 α≤0\alpha \le 0α≤0 时, lim⁡x→0+f(x)xα=0\lim\limits_{x \to 0^+} \dfrac{f(x)}{x^\alpha} = 0x→0+lim​xαf(x)​=0. 当 α>0\alpha > 0α>0 时, lim⁡x→0+f(x)xα\lim\limits_{x \to 0^+} \dfrac{f(x)}{x^\alpha}x→0+lim​xαf(x)​ 为 00\dfrac{0}{0}00​ 型未定式. lim⁡x→0+f(x)xα=洛必达lim⁡x→0+ln⁡(1+x2)αxα−1=ln⁡(1+x2)∼x2lim⁡x→0+x2αxα−1=1αlim⁡x→0+x3−α\lim\limits_{x \to 0^+} \dfrac{f(x)}{x^\alpha} \xlongequal{\text{洛必达}} \lim\limits_{x \to 0^+} \dfrac{\ln(1 + x^2)}{\alpha x^{\alpha-1}} \xlongequal{\ln(1 + x^2) \sim x^2} \lim\limits_{x \to 0^+} \dfrac{x^2}{\alpha x^{\alpha-1}} = \dfrac{1}{\alpha} \lim\limits_{x \to 0^+} x^{3-\alpha}x→0+lim​xαf(x)​洛必达x→0+lim​αxα−1ln(1+x2)​ln(1+x2)∼x2x→0+lim​αxα−1x2​=α1​x→0+lim​x3−α. 因此, 当 α>3\alpha > 3α>3 时, lim⁡x→0+f(x)xα=+∞\lim\limits_{x \to 0^+} \dfrac{f(x)}{x^\alpha} = +\inftyx→0+lim​xαf(x)​=+∞; 当 α=3\alpha = 3α=3 时, lim⁡x→0+f(x)x3=13\lim\limits_{x \to 0^+} \dfrac{f(x)}{x^3} = \dfrac{1}{3}x→0+lim​x3f(x)​=31​; 当 α<3\alpha < 3α<3 时, lim⁡x→0+f(x)xα=0\lim\limits_{x \to 0^+} \dfrac{f(x)}{x^\alpha} = 0x→0+lim​xαf(x)​=0. 综上所述, 1<α<31 < \alpha < 31<α<3.

(1997 数一二) 设函数 f(x)f(x)f(x) 连续, φ(x)=∫01f(xt)dt\varphi(x)=\int_{0}^{1}f(xt)\mathrm{d}tφ(x)=∫01​f(xt)dt, 且 lim⁡x→0f(x)x=A\lim\limits_{x \to 0}\dfrac{f(x)}{x}=Ax→0lim​xf(x)​=A ( AAA 为常数), 求 φ′(x)\varphi'(x)φ′(x) 并讨论 φ′(x)\varphi'(x)φ′(x) 在 x=0x=0x=0 处的连续性

答案因为 lim⁡x→0f(x)x\lim\limits_{x \to 0} \dfrac{f(x)}{x}x→0lim​xf(x)​ 存在,   ⟹  lim⁡x→0f(x)=0\implies \lim\limits_{x \to 0} f(x) = 0⟹x→0lim​f(x)=0. 又因为 f(x)f(x)f(x) 连续, 得出: lim⁡x→0f(x)=f(0)=0\lim\limits_{x \to 0} f(x) = f(0) = 0x→0lim​f(x)=f(0)=0. 当 x=0x = 0x=0 时, φ(0)=∫01f(0)dt=f(0)=0\varphi(0) = \int_{0}^{1} f(0) \mathrm{d}t = f(0) = 0φ(0)=∫01​f(0)dt=f(0)=0. 当 x≠0x \neq 0x=0 时, φ(x)=∫01f(xt)dt=1x∫01f(xt)d(xt)=令 u=xt1x∫0xf(u)du\varphi(x) = \int_{0}^{1} f(xt) \mathrm{d}t = \dfrac{1}{x} \int_{0}^{1} f(xt) \mathrm{d}(xt) \xlongequal{\text{令 } u=xt} \dfrac{1}{x} \int_{0}^{x} f(u) \mathrm{d}uφ(x)=∫01​f(xt)dt=x1​∫01​f(xt)d(xt)令 u=xtx1​∫0x​f(u)du. 于是 φ(x)={∫0xf(u)dux,x≠0,0,x=0.\varphi(x) = \begin{cases} \dfrac{\int_{0}^{x} f(u) \mathrm{d}u}{x}, & x \neq 0, \\ 0, & x = 0. \end{cases}φ(x)=⎩⎨⎧​x∫0x​f(u)du​,0,​x=0,x=0.​ 当 x≠0x \neq 0x=0 时, φ′(x)=xf(x)−∫0xf(u)dux2\varphi'(x) = \dfrac{xf(x) - \int_{0}^{x} f(u) \mathrm{d}u}{x^2}φ′(x)=x2xf(x)−∫0x​f(u)du​. φ′(0)≜lim⁡x→0φ(x)−φ(0)x−0=lim⁡x→01x⋅∫0xf(u)dux=lim⁡x→0∫0xf(u)dux2=洛lim⁡x→0f(x)2x=12lim⁡x→0f(x)x=A2\varphi'(0) \triangleq \lim\limits_{x \to 0} \dfrac{\varphi(x) - \varphi(0)}{x - 0} = \lim\limits_{x \to 0} \dfrac{\dfrac{1}{x} \cdot \int_{0}^{x} f(u) \mathrm{d}u}{x} = \lim\limits_{x \to 0} \dfrac{\int_{0}^{x} f(u) \mathrm{d}u}{x^2} \xlongequal{\text{洛}} \lim\limits_{x \to 0} \dfrac{f(x)}{2x} = \dfrac{1}{2} \lim\limits_{x \to 0} \dfrac{f(x)}{x} = \dfrac{A}{2}φ′(0)≜x→0lim​x−0φ(x)−φ(0)​=x→0lim​xx1​⋅∫0x​f(u)du​=x→0lim​x2∫0x​f(u)du​洛x→0lim​2xf(x)​=21​x→0lim​xf(x)​=2A​. 综上所述, 得出: φ′(x)={xf(x)−∫0xf(u)dux2,x≠0,A2,x=0.\varphi'(x) = \begin{cases} \dfrac{xf(x) - \int_{0}^{x} f(u) \mathrm{d}u}{x^2}, & x \neq 0, \\ \dfrac{A}{2}, & x = 0. \end{cases}φ′(x)=⎩⎨⎧​x2xf(x)−∫0x​f(u)du​,2A​,​x=0,x=0.​ lim⁡x→0φ′(x)=lim⁡x→0xf(x)−∫0xf(u)dux2=lim⁡x→0f(x)x−lim⁡x→0∫0xf(u)dux2=A−A2=A2=φ′(0)\lim\limits_{x \to 0} \varphi'(x) = \lim\limits_{x \to 0} \dfrac{xf(x) - \int_{0}^{x} f(u) \mathrm{d}u}{x^2} = \lim\limits_{x \to 0} \dfrac{f(x)}{x} - \lim\limits_{x \to 0} \dfrac{\int_{0}^{x} f(u) \mathrm{d}u}{x^2} = A - \dfrac{A}{2} = \dfrac{A}{2} = \varphi'(0)x→0lim​φ′(x)=x→0lim​x2xf(x)−∫0x​f(u)du​=x→0lim​xf(x)​−x→0lim​x2∫0x​f(u)du​=A−2A​=2A​=φ′(0). 由于 lim⁡x→0φ′(x)=φ′(0)=A2\lim\limits_{x \to 0} \varphi'(x) = \varphi'(0) = \dfrac{A}{2}x→0lim​φ′(x)=φ′(0)=2A​, 故函数 φ′(x)\varphi'(x)φ′(x) 在 x=0x = 0x=0 处连续.

(2022 数二) 已知函数 f(x)f(x)f(x) 在 x=1x=1x=1 处可导且 lim⁡x→0f(ex2)−3f(1+sin⁡2x)x2=2\lim\limits_{x \to 0} \dfrac{f(\mathrm{e}^{x^2}) - 3f(1 + \sin^2 x)}{x^2} = 2x→0lim​x2f(ex2)−3f(1+sin2x)​=2, 求 f′(1)f'(1)f′(1)

答案由 lim⁡x→0f(ex2)−3f(1+sin⁡2x)x2=2\lim\limits_{x \to 0} \dfrac{f\left(\mathrm{e}^{x^{2}}\right)-3 f\left(1+\sin ^{2} x\right)}{x^{2}}=2x→0lim​x2f(ex2)−3f(1+sin2x)​=2 知 lim⁡x→0[f(ex2)−3f(1+sin⁡2x)]=0.\lim\limits_{x \to 0}\left[f\left(\mathrm{e}^{x^2}\right)-3 f\left(1+\sin ^2 x\right)\right]=0.x→0lim​[f(ex2)−3f(1+sin2x)]=0. 因为 f(x)f(x)f(x) 在 x=1x=1x=1 处可导, 所以 f(x)f(x)f(x) 在 x=1x=1x=1 处连续. 故 lim⁡x→0[f(ex2)−3f(1+sin⁡2x)]=f(1)−3f(1)=−2f(1)=0,\lim\limits_{x \to 0}\left[f\left(\mathrm{e}^{x^2}\right)-3 f\left(1+\sin ^2 x\right)\right]=f(1)-3 f(1)=-2 f(1)=0,x→0lim​[f(ex2)−3f(1+sin2x)]=f(1)−3f(1)=−2f(1)=0, 即 f(1)=0.f(1)=0.f(1)=0. 因为 f′(1)f^{\prime}(1)f′(1) 存在, 根据导数的定义有 f′(1)=f+′(1)f^{\prime}(1)=f_{+}^{\prime}(1)f′(1)=f+′​(1) 且极限 lim⁡x→0f(ex2)−f(1)ex2−1=f+′(1)\lim\limits_{x \to 0} \dfrac{f\left(\mathrm{e}^{x^{2}}\right)-f(1)}{\mathrm{e}^{x^{2}}-1}=f_{+}^{\prime}(1)x→0lim​ex2−1f(ex2)−f(1)​=f+′​(1) 存在. 极限 lim⁡x→0f(1+sin⁡2x)−f(1)sin⁡2x=f+′(1)\lim\limits_{x \to 0} \dfrac{f\left(1+\sin ^2 x\right)-f(1)}{\sin ^2 x}=f_{+}^{\prime}(1)x→0lim​sin2xf(1+sin2x)−f(1)​=f+′​(1) 也存在. 则 lim⁡x→0f(ex2)−3f(1+sin⁡2x)x2=lim⁡x→0[f(ex2)x2−3f(1+sin⁡2x)x2]=lim⁡x→0[f(ex2)−f(1)ex2−1⋅ex2−1x2]−lim⁡x→0[3f(1+sin⁡2x)−3f(1)sin⁡2x⋅sin⁡2xx2]=f+′(1)−3f+′(1)=−2f+′(1)=−2f′(1)\lim\limits_{x \to 0} \dfrac{f\left(\mathrm{e}^{x^2}\right)-3 f\left(1+\sin ^2 x\right)}{x^2}=\lim\limits_{x \to 0}\left[\dfrac{f\left(\mathrm{e}^{x^2}\right)}{x^2}-\dfrac{3 f\left(1+\sin ^2 x\right)}{x^2}\right]=\lim\limits_{x \to 0}\left[\dfrac{f\left(\mathrm{e}^{x^2}\right)-f(1)}{\mathrm{e}^{x^2}-1} \cdot \dfrac{\mathrm{e}^{x^2}-1}{x^2}\right]-\lim\limits_{x \to 0}\left[\dfrac{3 f\left(1+\sin ^2 x\right)-3 f(1)}{\sin ^2 x} \cdot \dfrac{\sin ^2 x}{x^2}\right]=f_{+}^{\prime}(1)-3 f_{+}^{\prime}(1)=-2 f_{+}^{\prime}(1)=-2 f^{\prime}(1)x→0lim​x2f(ex2)−3f(1+sin2x)​=x→0lim​​x2f(ex2)​−x23f(1+sin2x)​​=x→0lim​​ex2−1f(ex2)−f(1)​⋅x2ex2−1​​−x→0lim​[sin2x3f(1+sin2x)−3f(1)​⋅x2sin2x​]=f+′​(1)−3f+′​(1)=−2f+′​(1)=−2f′(1) 所以 −2f′(1)=2-2 f^{\prime}(1)=2−2f′(1)=2 , 解得 f′(1)=−1f^{\prime}(1)=-1f′(1)=−1

(2025 数二) 设函数 f(x)f(x)f(x) 在 x=0x=0x=0 处连续, 且 lim⁡x→0xf(x)−e2sin⁡x+1ln⁡(1+x)+ln⁡(1−x)=−3\lim\limits_{x \to 0} \dfrac{x f(x)-\mathrm{e}^{2 \sin x}+1}{\ln (1+x)+\ln (1-x)}=-3x→0lim​ln(1+x)+ln(1−x)xf(x)−e2sinx+1​=−3. 证明： f(x)f(x)f(x) 在 x=0x=0x=0 处可导, 并求 f′(0)f^{\prime}(0)f′(0).

答案ln⁡(1+x)=x−12x2+o(x2)\ln (1+x)=x-\dfrac{1}{2}x^2+o\left(x^2\right)ln(1+x)=x−21​x2+o(x2), ln⁡(1−x)=(−x)−12(−x)2+o(x2)\ln (1-x)=(-x)-\dfrac{1}{2}(-x)^2+o\left(x^2\right)ln(1−x)=(−x)−21​(−x)2+o(x2), lim⁡x→0xf(x)−e2sin⁡x+1−x2\lim\limits_{x \to 0} \dfrac{x f(x)-\mathrm{e}^{2 \sin x}+1}{-x^2}x→0lim​−x2xf(x)−e2sinx+1​, 2sin⁡x=2(x−16x3+o(x3))=2x−13x3+o(x3)2 \sin x=2\left(x-\dfrac{1}{6} x^3+o\left(x^3\right)\right)=2 x-\dfrac{1}{3} x^3+o\left(x^3\right)2sinx=2(x−61​x3+o(x3))=2x−31​x3+o(x3), e2sin⁡x=e2x−13x3+o(x3)=1+(2x)+12(4x2)+o(x2)=1+2x+2x2+o(x2)\mathrm{e}^{2 \sin x}=\mathrm{e}^{2 x-\dfrac{1}{3} x^3+o\left(x^3\right)}=1+(2 x)+\dfrac{1}{2}\left(4 x^2\right)+o\left(x^2\right)=1+2 x+2 x^2+o\left(x^2\right)e2sinx=e2x−31​x3+o(x3)=1+(2x)+21​(4x2)+o(x2)=1+2x+2x2+o(x2), I=lim⁡x→0xf(x)−2x−2x2−x2=lim⁡x→0f(x)−2−2x−x=lim⁡x→0f(x)−2−x+2=−3⇒lim⁡x→0f(x)−2−x=−5I=\lim\limits_{x \to 0} \dfrac{x f(x)-2 x-2 x^2}{-x^2}=\lim\limits_{x \to 0} \dfrac{f(x)-2-2 x}{-x}=\lim\limits_{x \to 0} \dfrac{f(x)-2}{-x}+2=-3 \Rightarrow \lim\limits_{x \to 0} \dfrac{f(x)-2}{-x}=-5I=x→0lim​−x2xf(x)−2x−2x2​=x→0lim​−xf(x)−2−2x​=x→0lim​−xf(x)−2​+2=−3⇒x→0lim​−xf(x)−2​=−5, lim⁡x→0f(x)−2x=5\lim\limits_{x \to 0} \dfrac{f(x)-2}{x}=5x→0lim​xf(x)−2​=5, lim⁡x→0f(x)−2=0⇒lim⁡x→0f(x)=2=f(0)\lim\limits_{x \to 0} f(x)-2=0 \Rightarrow \lim\limits_{x \to 0} f(x)=2=f(0)x→0lim​f(x)−2=0⇒x→0lim​f(x)=2=f(0), lim⁡x→0f(x)−f(0)x−0=5\lim\limits_{x \to 0} \dfrac{f(x)-f(0)}{x-0}=5x→0lim​x−0f(x)−f(0)​=5, f′(0)=5f^{\prime}(0)=5f′(0)=5

(2025 数二) 设函数 f(x)f(x)f(x) 连续, 给出下列4个条件: (1) lim⁡x→0∣f(x)∣−f(0)x\lim\limits_{x \to 0} \dfrac{|f(x)| - f(0)}{x}x→0lim​x∣f(x)∣−f(0)​ 存在; (2) lim⁡x→0f(x)−∣f(0)∣x\lim\limits_{x \to 0} \dfrac{f(x) - |f(0)|}{x}x→0lim​xf(x)−∣f(0)∣​ 存在; (3) lim⁡x→0∣f(x)∣x\lim\limits_{x \to 0} \dfrac{|f(x)|}{x}x→0lim​x∣f(x)∣​ 存在; (4) lim⁡x→0∣f(x)∣−∣f(0)∣x\lim\limits_{x \to 0} \dfrac{|f(x)| - |f(0)|}{x}x→0lim​x∣f(x)∣−∣f(0)∣​ 存在. 其中可得到 “f(x)f(x)f(x) 在 x=0x = 0x=0 处可导” 的条件个数为
(A) 1
(B) 2
© 3
(D) 4

答案(D) (3) 记 lim⁡x→0∣f(x)∣x=a\lim\limits_{x \to 0} \dfrac{|f(x)|}{x}=ax→0lim​x∣f(x)∣​=a,由 x→0+x \to 0^{+}x→0+ 时,a⩾0a \geqslant 0a⩾0; x→0−x \to 0^{-}x→0− 时,a⩽0a \leqslant 0a⩽0,有 a=0a=0a=0,且 f(0)=lim⁡x→0f(x)=lim⁡x→0∣f(x)∣=0f(0)=\lim\limits_{x \to 0} f(x)=\lim\limits_{x \to 0}|f(x)|=0f(0)=x→0lim​f(x)=x→0lim​∣f(x)∣=0,故由 lim⁡x→0∣f(x)∣x=0\lim\limits_{x \to 0} \dfrac{|f(x)|}{x}=0x→0lim​x∣f(x)∣​=0,可知对任意 ε>0\varepsilon > 0ε>0,在 x=0x=0x=0 的某去心邻域中,都有 ∣∣f(x)∣x−0∣=∣f(x)x−0∣<ε\left|\dfrac{|f(x)|}{x}-0\right|=\left|\dfrac{f(x)}{x}-0\right|<\varepsilon​x∣f(x)∣​−0​=​xf(x)​−0​<ε,得 lim⁡x→0f(x)x=0\lim\limits_{x \to 0} \dfrac{f(x)}{x}=0x→0lim​xf(x)​=0,即 f′(0)=0f^{\prime}(0)=0f′(0)=0。

(2020 数一) 设函数 f(x)f(x)f(x) 在区间 (−1,1)(-1,1)(−1,1) 内有定义, 且 lim⁡x→0f(x)=0\lim\limits_{x \to 0} f(x)=0x→0lim​f(x)=0, 则
(A) 当 lim⁡x→0f(x)∣x∣\lim\limits_{x \to 0} \dfrac{f(x)}{\sqrt{|x|}}x→0lim​∣x∣​f(x)​ 时, f(x)f(x)f(x) 在 x=0x=0x=0 处可导
(B) 当 lim⁡x→0f(x)x2=0\lim\limits_{x \to 0} \dfrac{f(x)}{x^{2}}=0x→0lim​x2f(x)​=0 时, f(x)f(x)f(x) 在 x=0x=0x=0 处可导
© 当 f(x)f(x)f(x) 在 x=0x=0x=0 处可导时, lim⁡x→0f(x)∣x∣=0\lim\limits_{x \to 0} \dfrac{f(x)}{\sqrt{|x|}}=0x→0lim​∣x∣​f(x)​=0
(D) 当 f(x)f(x)f(x) 在 x=0x=0x=0 处可导时, lim⁡x→0f(x)x2=0\lim\limits_{x \to 0} \dfrac{f(x)}{x^{2}}=0x→0lim​x2f(x)​=0

答案©

(1994 数二三) 曲线 y=e1x2arctan⁡x2+x+1(x−1)(x+2)y = \text{e}^{\dfrac{1}{x^2}} \arctan \dfrac{x^2 + x + 1}{(x - 1)(x + 2)}y=ex21​arctan(x−1)(x+2)x2+x+1​ 的渐近线有
(A) 1 条
(B) 2 条
© 3 条
(D) 4 条

答案(B)

(2000 数二) 曲线 y=(2x−1)e1xy = (2x - 1)\text{e}^{\dfrac{1}{x}}y=(2x−1)ex1​ 的斜渐近线方程为

答案 y=2x+1y=2x+1y=2x+1

(2020 数二) 求曲线 y=x1+x(1+x)x(x>0)y = \dfrac{\displaystyle x^{1+x}}{\displaystyle (1+x)^x} (x > 0)y=(1+x)xx1+x​(x>0) 的斜渐近线方程

答案 y=xe+12ey=\dfrac{x}{e}+\dfrac{1}{2e}y=ex​+2e1​

(2025 数二) 曲线 y=x3−3x2+13y = \sqrt[3]{x^3 - 3x^2 + 1}y=3x3−3x2+1​ 的渐近线方程为

答案 y=x−1y=x-1y=x−1

(2025 数三) 设 g(x)g(x)g(x) 是函数 f(x)=12ln⁡3+x3−xf(x) = \dfrac{1}{2} \ln \dfrac{3+x}{3-x}f(x)=21​ln3−x3+x​ 的反函数, 则曲线 y=g(x)y = g(x)y=g(x) 的渐近线方程为

答案 y=±3y=\pm 3y=±3

(2021 数一) 设函数 f(x)=sin⁡x1+x2f(x) = \dfrac{\displaystyle \sin x}{\displaystyle 1+x^2}f(x)=1+x2sinx​ 在 x=0x = 0x=0 处的 333 次泰勒多项式为 ax+bx2+cx3ax + bx^2 + cx^3ax+bx2+cx3, 则
(A) a=1,b=0,c=−76a = 1, b = 0, c = -\dfrac{7}{6}a=1,b=0,c=−67​
(B) a=1,b=0,c=76a = 1, b = 0, c = \dfrac{7}{6}a=1,b=0,c=67​
© a=−1,b=−1,c=−76a = -1, b = -1, c = -\dfrac{7}{6}a=−1,b=−1,c=−67​
(D) a=−1,b=−1,c=76a = -1, b = -1, c = \dfrac{7}{6}a=−1,b=−1,c=67​

答案(A)

(2021 数二三) 当 x→0x \to 0x→0 时, ∫0x2(et3−1)dt\int_{0}^{x^2} (e^{t^3} - 1) dt∫0x2​(et3−1)dt 是 x7x^7x7 的
(A) 低阶无穷小
(B) 等价无穷小
© 高阶无穷小
(D) 同阶但非等价无穷小

答案©

(1997 数三) 设函数 f(x)=∫01−cos⁡xsin⁡t2dt,g(x)=x55+x66f(x) = \int_{0}^{1 - \cos x} \sin t^2 dt, g(x) = \dfrac{\displaystyle x^5}{\displaystyle 5} + \dfrac{\displaystyle x^6}{\displaystyle 6}f(x)=∫01−cosx​sint2dt,g(x)=5x5​+6x6​, 则当 x→0x \to 0x→0 时, f(x)f(x)f(x) 是 g(x)g(x)g(x) 的
(A) 低阶无穷小
(B) 高阶无穷小
© 等价无穷小
(D) 同阶但不等价的无穷小

答案(B)

(2004 数一二) 把 x→0+x \to 0^+x→0+ 时的无穷小量 α=∫0xcos⁡t2dt,β=∫0x2tan⁡tdt,γ=∫0xsin⁡t3dt\alpha = \int_{0}^{x} \cos t^2 dt, \beta = \int_{0}^{x^2} \tan \sqrt{t} dt, \gamma = \int_{0}^{\sqrt{x}} \sin t^3 dtα=∫0x​cost2dt,β=∫0x2​tant​dt,γ=∫0x​​sint3dt 排列起来, 使排在后面的是前一个的高阶无穷小, 则正确的排列次序是
(A) α,β,γ\alpha, \beta, \gammaα,β,γ
(B) α,γ,β\alpha, \gamma, \betaα,γ,β
© β,α,γ\beta, \alpha, \gammaβ,α,γ
(D) β,γ,α\beta, \gamma, \alphaβ,γ,α

答案(B)

(2016 数二) 设 α1=x(cos⁡x−1),α2=xln⁡(1+x3),α3=x+13−1\alpha_1 = x(\cos \sqrt{x} - 1), \alpha_2 = \sqrt{x} \ln(1 + \sqrt[3]{x}), \alpha_3 = \sqrt[3]{x+1} - 1α1​=x(cosx​−1),α2​=x​ln(1+3x​),α3​=3x+1​−1. 当 x→0+x \to 0^+x→0+ 时, 以上 3 个无穷小量按照从低阶到高阶的排序是
(A) α1,α2,α3.\alpha_1, \alpha_2, \alpha_3.α1​,α2​,α3​.
(B) α2,α3,α1.\alpha_2, \alpha_3, \alpha_1.α2​,α3​,α1​.
© α2,α1,α3.\alpha_2, \alpha_1, \alpha_3.α2​,α1​,α3​.
(D) α3,α2,α1.\alpha_3, \alpha_2, \alpha_1.α3​,α2​,α1​.

答案(B)

(2006 数二) 试确定 A,B,CA, B, CA,B,C 的值, 使得 ex(1+Bx+Cx2)=1+Ax+o(x3)e^x (1 + Bx + Cx^2) = 1 + Ax + o(x^3)ex(1+Bx+Cx2)=1+Ax+o(x3), 其中 o(x3)o(x^3)o(x3) 是当 x→0x \to 0x→0 时比 x3x^3x3 高阶的无穷小

答案 ex(1+Bx+Cx2)=[1+x+12x2+16x3+o(x3)](1+Bx+Cx2)=1+(B+1)x+(C+B+12)x2+(C+B2+16)x3+o(x3)=1+Ax+o(x3)⇒{B+1=AC+B+12=0C+B2+16=0⇒{A=13B=−23C=16e^x(1+Bx+Cx^2)=[1+x+\dfrac{1}{2}x^2+\dfrac{1}{6}x^3+o(x^3)](1+Bx+Cx^2) =1+(B+1)x+(C+B+\dfrac{1}{2})x^2+(C+\dfrac{B}{2}+\dfrac{1}{6})x^3+o(x^3) =1+Ax+o(x^3) \Rightarrow \begin{cases} B+1=A \\ C+B+\dfrac{1}{2}=0 \\ C+\dfrac{B}{2}+\dfrac{1}{6}=0 \end{cases} \Rightarrow \begin{cases} A=\dfrac{1}{3} \\ B=-\dfrac{2}{3} \\ C=\dfrac{1}{6} \end{cases}ex(1+Bx+Cx2)=[1+x+21​x2+61​x3+o(x3)](1+Bx+Cx2)=1+(B+1)x+(C+B+21​)x2+(C+2B​+61​)x3+o(x3)=1+Ax+o(x3)⇒⎩⎨⎧​B+1=AC+B+21​=0C+2B​+61​=0​⇒⎩⎨⎧​A=31​B=−32​C=61​​

(2009 数一二三) 当 x→0x \to 0x→0 时, f(x)=x−sin⁡axf(x) = x - \sin axf(x)=x−sinax 与 g(x)=x2ln⁡(1−bx)g(x) = x^2 \ln(1 - bx)g(x)=x2ln(1−bx) 是等价无穷小, 则
(A) a=1,b=−16.a = 1, b = -\dfrac{1}{6}.a=1,b=−61​.
(B) a=1,b=16.a = 1, b = \dfrac{1}{6}.a=1,b=61​.
© a=−1,b=−16.a = -1, b = -\dfrac{1}{6}.a=−1,b=−61​.
(D) a=−1,b=16.a = -1, b = \dfrac{1}{6}.a=−1,b=61​.

答案(A)

(2003 数三) 设 f(x)=1πx+1sin⁡πx−1π(1−x),x∈[12,1).f(x) = \dfrac{1}{\pi x} + \dfrac{1}{\sin \pi x} - \dfrac{1}{\pi(1 - x)}, x \in [\dfrac{1}{2}, 1).f(x)=πx1​+sinπx1​−π(1−x)1​,x∈[21​,1). 试补充定义 f(1)f(1)f(1) 使得 f(x)f(x)f(x) 在 [12,1][\dfrac{1}{2}, 1][21​,1] 上连续

答案lim⁡x→1−f(x)=lim⁡x→1−[1πx+1sin⁡πx−1π(1−x)]=1π+lim⁡x→1−π(1−x)−sin⁡πxπ(1−x)sin⁡πx=令 y=1−x1π+lim⁡y→0+πy−sin⁡[π(1−y)]πysin⁡[π(1−y)]=1π+lim⁡y→0+πy−sin⁡πyπysin⁡πy=1π+lim⁡y→0+πy−sin⁡πyπ2y2=1π+lim⁡y→0+16(πy)3π2y2=1π+16lim⁡y→0+πy=1π.\lim\limits_{x \to 1^-} f(x) = \lim\limits_{x \to 1^-} \left[ \dfrac{1}{\pi x} + \dfrac{1}{\sin \pi x} - \dfrac{1}{\pi(1 - x)} \right] = \dfrac{1}{\pi} + \lim\limits_{x \to 1^-} \dfrac{\pi(1-x) - \sin \pi x}{\pi(1-x) \sin \pi x} \xlongequal{\text{令 } y = 1-x} \dfrac{1}{\pi} + \lim\limits_{y \to 0^+} \dfrac{\pi y - \sin [\pi(1-y)]}{\pi y \sin [\pi(1-y)]} = \dfrac{1}{\pi} + \lim\limits_{y \to 0^+} \dfrac{\pi y - \sin \pi y}{\pi y \sin \pi y} = \dfrac{1}{\pi} + \lim\limits_{y \to 0^+} \dfrac{\pi y - \sin \pi y}{\pi^2 y^2} = \dfrac{1}{\pi} + \lim\limits_{y \to 0^+} \dfrac{\dfrac{1}{6}(\pi y)^3}{\pi^2 y^2} = \dfrac{1}{\pi} + \dfrac{1}{6} \lim\limits_{y \to 0^+} \pi y = \dfrac{1}{\pi}.x→1−lim​f(x)=x→1−lim​[πx1​+sinπx1​−π(1−x)1​]=π1​+x→1−lim​π(1−x)sinπxπ(1−x)−sinπx​令 y=1−xπ1​+y→0+lim​πysin[π(1−y)]πy−sin[π(1−y)]​=π1​+y→0+lim​πysinπyπy−sinπy​=π1​+y→0+lim​π2y2πy−sinπy​=π1​+y→0+lim​π2y261​(πy)3​=π1​+61​y→0+lim​πy=π1​., 要使 f(x)f(x)f(x) 在 [12,1][\dfrac{1}{2}, 1][21​,1] 上连续, 即左极限与函数值相等即可, 即 f(1)=1πf(1) = \dfrac{1}{\pi}f(1)=π1​ 就可使 f(x)f(x)f(x) 在 [12,1][\dfrac{1}{2}, 1][21​,1] 上连续.

(1996 数二) 设函数 f(x)={1−2x2,x<−1,x3,−1⩽x⩽2,12x−16,x>2.f(x) = \begin{cases} 1 - 2x^2, & x < -1, \\ x^3, & -1 \leqslant x \leqslant 2, \\ 12x - 16, & x > 2. \end{cases}f(x)=⎩⎨⎧​1−2x2,x3,12x−16,​x<−1,−1⩽x⩽2,x>2.​
(1) 写出 f(x)f(x)f(x) 的反函数 g(x)g(x)g(x) 的表达式;
(2) g(x)g(x)g(x) 是否有间断点、不可导点? 若有, 指出这些点.

答案(1) 当 x<−1x < -1x<−1 时, y<−1y < -1y<−1; 当 −1⩽x⩽2-1 \leqslant x \leqslant 2−1⩽x⩽2 时, −1⩽y⩽8-1 \leqslant y \leqslant 8−1⩽y⩽8; 当 x>2x > 2x>2 时, y>8y > 8y>8, 当 f(x)=1−2x2f(x) = 1 - 2x^2f(x)=1−2x2 时, 有 2x2=1−f(x)2x^2 = 1 - f(x)2x2=1−f(x) 即 x=−1−f(x)2x = -\sqrt{\dfrac{1-f(x)}{2}}x=−21−f(x)​​, 当 f(x)=x3f(x) = x^3f(x)=x3, 有 x=f(x)3x = \sqrt[3]{f(x)}x=3f(x)​, 当 f(x)=12x−16f(x) = 12x - 16f(x)=12x−16 时, 有 x=f(x)+1612x = \dfrac{f(x)+16}{12}x=12f(x)+16​, 根据反函数的定义, 交换 xxx 和 yyy, 所以有 f(x)f(x)f(x) 的反函数为 g(x)={−1−x2,x<−1,x3,−1⩽x⩽8,x+1612,x>8g(x) = \begin{cases} -\sqrt{\dfrac{1-x}{2}}, & x < -1, \\ \sqrt[3]{x}, & -1 \leqslant x \leqslant 8, \\ \dfrac{x+16}{12}, & x > 8 \end{cases}g(x)=⎩⎨⎧​−21−x​​,3x​,12x+16​,​x<−1,−1⩽x⩽8,x>8​ (2) 因为 g(−1)=−13=−1g(-1) = \sqrt[3]{-1} = -1g(−1)=3−1​=−1, g(−1−)=lim⁡x→−1−g(x)=−1+12=−1g(-1^-) = \lim\limits_{x \to -1^-} g(x) = -\sqrt{\dfrac{1+1}{2}} = -1g(−1−)=x→−1−lim​g(x)=−21+1​​=−1, g(−1+)=lim⁡x→−1+g(x)=−13=−1g(-1^+) = \lim\limits_{x \to -1^+} g(x) = \sqrt[3]{-1} = -1g(−1+)=x→−1+lim​g(x)=3−1​=−1; g(8)=83=2g(8) = \sqrt[3]{8} = 2g(8)=38​=2 g(8−)=lim⁡x→8−g(x)=83=2g(8^-) = \lim\limits_{x \to 8^-} g(x) = \sqrt[3]{8} = 2g(8−)=x→8−lim​g(x)=38​=2, g(8+)=lim⁡x→8+g(x)=8+1612=2g(8^+) = \lim\limits_{x \to 8^+} g(x) = \dfrac{8+16}{12} = 2g(8+)=x→8+lim​g(x)=128+16​=2, 及初等函数在有定义的区间内处处连续, 所以这个分段函数 g(x)g(x)g(x) 在 RRR 上处处连续, 没有间断点, g−′(−1)=(−1−x2)′∣x=−1=−12⋅11+12⋅(−12)=14g_-^\prime(-1) = \left. \left( -\sqrt{\dfrac{1-x}{2}} \right)^\prime \right|_{x=-1} = -\dfrac{1}{2} \cdot \dfrac{1}{\sqrt{\dfrac{1+1}{2}}} \cdot \left( -\dfrac{1}{2} \right) = \dfrac{1}{4}g−′​(−1)=(−21−x​​)′​x=−1​=−21​⋅21+1​​1​⋅(−21​)=41​, 又 g+′(−1)=(x3)′∣x=−1=13(−1)−23=13g_+^\prime(-1) = \left. (\sqrt[3]{x})^\prime \right|_{x=-1} = \dfrac{1}{3}(-1)^{-\dfrac{2}{3}} = \dfrac{1}{3}g+′​(−1)=(3x​)′∣x=−1​=31​(−1)−32​=31​; g−′(8)=(x3)′∣x=8=13(8)−23=112g_-^\prime(8) = \left. (\sqrt[3]{x})^\prime \right|_{x=8} = \dfrac{1}{3}(8)^{-\dfrac{2}{3}} = \dfrac{1}{12}g−′​(8)=(3x​)′∣x=8​=31​(8)−32​=121​, g+′(8)=112g_+^\prime(8) = \dfrac{1}{12}g+′​(8)=121​; 又 lim⁡x→0g(x)−g(0)x=lim⁡x→0x3x=∞\lim\limits_{x \to 0} \dfrac{g(x)-g(0)}{x} = \lim\limits_{x \to 0} \dfrac{\sqrt[3]{x}}{x} = \inftyx→0lim​xg(x)−g(0)​=x→0lim​x3x​​=∞. 所以 g(x)g(x)g(x) 不可导的点有两个: x=−1x = -1x=−1 和 x=0x = 0x=0.

(2024 数二) 函数 f(x)=∣x∣1(1−x)(x−2)f(x) = |x|^{\dfrac{1}{(1-x)(x-2)}}f(x)=∣x∣(1−x)(x−2)1​ 的第一类间断点的个数为
(A) 3
(B) 2
© 1
(D) 0

答案©

于文涛真题一本通

常数项级数

(2002 数一) 设 un≠0(n=1,2,⋯ )u_n \neq 0(n=1,2,\cdots)un​=0(n=1,2,⋯), 且 lim⁡n→∞nun=1\lim\limits_{n \to \infty} \dfrac{n}{u_n}=1n→∞lim​un​n​=1, 则级数 ∑n=1∞(−1)n+1(1un+1un+1)\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} (-1)^{n+1}\left(\dfrac{1}{u_n} + \dfrac{1}{u_{n+1}}\right)n=1∑∞​(−1)n+1(un​1​+un+1​1​)
(A) 发散
(B) 绝对收敛
© 条件收敛
(D) 无法判定

答案©. 考察原级数 ∑n=1∞(−1)n+1(1un+1un+1)\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty}(-1)^{n+1}(\dfrac{1}{u_n}+\dfrac{1}{u_{n+1}})n=1∑∞​(−1)n+1(un​1​+un+1​1​) 的前 nnn 项部分和 Sn=(1u1+1u2)−(1u2+1u3)+(1u3+1u4)−⋯+(−1)n+1(1un+1un+1)=1u1+(−1)n+11un+1S_n=(\dfrac{1}{u_1}+\dfrac{1}{u_2})-(\dfrac{1}{u_2}+\dfrac{1}{u_3})+(\dfrac{1}{u_3}+\dfrac{1}{u_4})-\dots+(-1)^{n+1}(\dfrac{1}{u_n}+\dfrac{1}{u_{n+1}})=\dfrac{1}{u_1}+(-1)^{n+1}\dfrac{1}{u_{n+1}}Sn​=(u1​1​+u2​1​)−(u2​1​+u3​1​)+(u3​1​+u4​1​)−⋯+(−1)n+1(un​1​+un+1​1​)=u1​1​+(−1)n+1un+1​1​,由 lim⁡n→∞nun=1>0\lim\limits_{n \to \infty}\dfrac{n}{u_n}=1 > 0n→∞lim​un​n​=1>0 知,当 nnn 充分大时, un>0u_n > 0un​>0 且 lim⁡n→∞un=+∞\lim\limits_{n \to \infty}u_n=+\inftyn→∞lim​un​=+∞. 所以 lim⁡n→∞Sn=1u1\lim\limits_{n \to \infty}S_n=\dfrac{1}{u_1}n→∞lim​Sn​=u1​1​ (收敛), 另一方面, ∑n=1∞(1un+1un+1)\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty}(\dfrac{1}{u_n}+\dfrac{1}{u_{n+1}})n=1∑∞​(un​1​+un+1​1​) 为正项级数, 用比较判别法的极限形式,由题设条件 lim⁡n→∞nun=1\lim\limits_{n \to \infty}\dfrac{n}{u_n}=1n→∞lim​un​n​=1 的启发, 考虑 lim⁡n→∞1un+1un+11n+1n+1=lim⁡n→∞un+1+ununun+12n+1n(n+1)=lim⁡n→∞(un+1+un)n(n+1)unun+1(2n+1)=lim⁡n→∞n(n+1)[(n+1)n⋅un+1(n+1)+unn]unun+12n+1n=lim⁡n→∞(n+1)n⋅un+1(n+1)+unnunn⋅un+1n+1⋅2n+1n=1\lim\limits_{n \to \infty}\dfrac{\dfrac{1}{u_n}+\dfrac{1}{u_{n+1}}}{\dfrac{1}{n}+\dfrac{1}{n+1}}=\lim\limits_{n \to \infty}\dfrac{\dfrac{u_{n+1}+u_n}{u_nu_{n+1}}}{\dfrac{2n+1}{n(n+1)}}=\lim\limits_{n \to \infty}\dfrac{(u_{n+1}+u_n)n(n+1)}{u_nu_{n+1}(2n+1)}=\lim\limits_{n \to \infty}\dfrac{n(n+1)[\dfrac{(n+1)}{n}\cdot\dfrac{u_{n+1}}{(n+1)}+\dfrac{u_n}{n}]}{u_nu_{n+1}\dfrac{2n+1}{n}}=\lim\limits_{n \to \infty}\dfrac{\dfrac{(n+1)}{n}\cdot\dfrac{u_{n+1}}{(n+1)}+\dfrac{u_n}{n}}{\dfrac{u_n}{n}\cdot\dfrac{u_{n+1}}{n+1}\cdot\dfrac{2n+1}{n}}=1n→∞lim​n1​+n+11​un​1​+un+1​1​​=n→∞lim​n(n+1)2n+1​un​un+1​un+1​+un​​​=n→∞lim​un​un+1​(2n+1)(un+1​+un​)n(n+1)​=n→∞lim​un​un+1​n2n+1​n(n+1)[n(n+1)​⋅(n+1)un+1​​+nun​​]​=n→∞lim​nun​​⋅n+1un+1​​⋅n2n+1​n(n+1)​⋅(n+1)un+1​​+nun​​​=1, 而级数 ∑n=1∞(1n+1n+1)=∑n=1∞2n+1n(n+1)\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty}(\dfrac{1}{n}+\dfrac{1}{n+1})=\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty}\dfrac{2n+1}{n(n+1)}n=1∑∞​(n1​+n+11​)=n=1∑∞​n(n+1)2n+1​ 是发散的, 所以 ∑n=1∞(1un+1un+1)\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty}(\dfrac{1}{u_n}+\dfrac{1}{u_{n+1}})n=1∑∞​(un​1​+un+1​1​) 也发散,所以选 ©

(2014 数一) 设数列 {an}\{ a_{n} \}{an​}, {bn}\{ b_{n} \}{bn​} 满足 0<an<π20 < a_{n} < \dfrac{\pi}{2}0<an​<2π​, 0<bn<π20 < b_{n} < \dfrac{\pi}{2}0<bn​<2π​, cos⁡an−an=cos⁡bn\cos a_{n} - a_{n} = \cos b_{n}cosan​−an​=cosbn​, 且级数 ∑n=1∞bn\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} b_{n}n=1∑∞​bn​ 收敛. (1) 证明: lim⁡n→∞an=0\lim\limits_{n \to \infty} a_{n} = 0n→∞lim​an​=0.
(2) 证明: 级数 ∑n=1∞anbn\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} \dfrac{a_{n}}{b_{n}}n=1∑∞​bn​an​​ 收敛.

答案标准答案: (I) 证明: 由 cos⁡an−an=cos⁡bn\cos a_{n} - a_{n} = \cos b_{n}cosan​−an​=cosbn​, 及 0<an<π2,0<bn<π20 < a_{n} < \dfrac{\pi}{2}, 0 < b_{n} < \dfrac{\pi}{2}0<an​<2π​,0<bn​<2π​ 可得 0<an=cos⁡an−cos⁡bn<π20 < a_{n} = \cos a_{n} - \cos b_{n} < \dfrac{\pi}{2}0<an​=cosan​−cosbn​<2π​, 所以 0<an<bn<π20 < a_{n} < b_{n} < \dfrac{\pi}{2}0<an​<bn​<2π​, 由于级数 ∑n=1∞bn\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} b_{n}n=1∑∞​bn​ 收敛, 所以级数 ∑n=1∞an\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} a_{n}n=1∑∞​an​ 也收敛, 由收敛的必要条件可得 lim⁡n→∞an=0\lim\limits_{n \to \infty} a_{n} = 0n→∞lim​an​=0. (II) 证明: 由于 0<an<π2,0<bn<π20 < a_{n} < \dfrac{\pi}{2}, 0 < b_{n} < \dfrac{\pi}{2}0<an​<2π​,0<bn​<2π​, 所以 sin⁡an+bn2≤an+bn2,sin⁡bn−an2≤bn−an2\sin \dfrac{a_{n} + b_{n}}{2} \le \dfrac{a_{n} + b_{n}}{2}, \sin \dfrac{b_{n} - a_{n}}{2} \le \dfrac{b_{n} - a_{n}}{2}sin2an​+bn​​≤2an​+bn​​,sin2bn​−an​​≤2bn​−an​​ anbn=cos⁡an−cos⁡bnbn=2sin⁡an+bn2sin⁡bn−an2bn≤2an+bn2bn−an2bn=bn2−an22bn<bn22bn=bn2\dfrac{a_{n}}{b_{n}} = \dfrac{\cos a_{n} - \cos b_{n}}{b_{n}} = \dfrac{2 \sin \dfrac{a_{n} + b_{n}}{2} \sin \dfrac{b_{n} - a_{n}}{2}}{b_{n}} \le \dfrac{2 \dfrac{a_{n} + b_{n}}{2} \dfrac{b_{n} - a_{n}}{2}}{b_{n}} = \dfrac{b_{n}^{2} - a_{n}^{2}}{2 b_{n}} < \dfrac{b_{n}^{2}}{2 b_{n}} = \dfrac{b_{n}}{2}bn​an​​=bn​cosan​−cosbn​​=bn​2sin2an​+bn​​sin2bn​−an​​​≤bn​22an​+bn​​2bn​−an​​​=2bn​bn2​−an2​​<2bn​bn2​​=2bn​​ 由于级数 ∑n=1∞bn\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} b_{n}n=1∑∞​bn​ 收敛, 由正项级数的比较审敛法可知级数 ∑n=1∞anbn\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} \dfrac{a_{n}}{b_{n}}n=1∑∞​bn​an​​ 收敛. 个人思路: (I) 通过假设 ana_nan​ 极限不存在推导出 cos⁡an−an\cos{a_n}-a_ncosan​−an​ 极限不存在的矛盾证明极限存在 (这里使用第二问的不等式放缩使用夹逼定理更加简洁). (II) 不等式放缩 an=cos⁡an−cos⁡bn≤1−cos⁡bn≤12bn2a_n = \cos{a_n} - \cos{b_n} \le 1 - \cos{b_n} \le \dfrac{1}{2}b_n^2an​=cosan​−cosbn​≤1−cosbn​≤21​bn2​

(2016 数一) 已知函数 f(x)f(x)f(x) 可导, 且 f(0)=1,0<f′(x)<12f(0) = 1, 0 < f'(x) < \dfrac{1}{2}f(0)=1,0<f′(x)<21​, 设数列 {xn}\{ x_{n} \}{xn​} 满足 xn+1=f(xn)(n=1,2,… )x_{n+1} = f(x_{n}) (n=1,2,\dots)xn+1​=f(xn​)(n=1,2,…), 证明
(1) 级数 ∑n=1∞(xn+1−xn)\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} (x_{n+1} - x_{n})n=1∑∞​(xn+1​−xn​) 绝对收敛
(2) lim⁡n→∞xn\lim\limits_{n \to \infty} x_{n}n→∞lim​xn​ 存在, 且 0<lim⁡n→∞xn<20 < \lim\limits_{n \to \infty} x_{n} < 20<n→∞lim​xn​<2.

答案(I) ∣xn+1−xn∣=∣f(xn)−f(xn−1)∣=∣f′(ξn)(xn−xn−1)∣<12∣xn−xn−1∣=12∣f(xn−1)−f(xn−2)∣<122∣xn−1−xn−2∣<⋯<12n−1∣x2−x1∣| x_{n+1} - x_{n} | = | f(x_{n}) - f(x_{n-1}) | = | f'(\xi_{n}) (x_{n} - x_{n-1}) | < \dfrac{1}{2} | x_{n} - x_{n-1} | = \dfrac{1}{2} | f(x_{n-1}) - f(x_{n-2}) | < \dfrac{1}{2^{2}} | x_{n-1} - x_{n-2} | < \dots < \dfrac{1}{2^{n-1}} | x_{2} - x_{1} |∣xn+1​−xn​∣=∣f(xn​)−f(xn−1​)∣=∣f′(ξn​)(xn​−xn−1​)∣<21​∣xn​−xn−1​∣=21​∣f(xn−1​)−f(xn−2​)∣<221​∣xn−1​−xn−2​∣<⋯<2n−11​∣x2​−x1​∣ 显然, ∑n=1∞12n−1∣x2−x1∣\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} \dfrac{1}{2^{n-1}} | x_{2} - x_{1} |n=1∑∞​2n−11​∣x2​−x1​∣ 收敛, 由比较审敛法可知 ∑n=1∞(xn+1−xn)\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} (x_{n+1} - x_{n})n=1∑∞​(xn+1​−xn​) 绝对收敛; (II) ∑n=1∞(xn+1−xn)\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} (x_{n+1} - x_{n})n=1∑∞​(xn+1​−xn​) 的前 n−1n-1n−1 项和记为 Sn−1S_{n-1}Sn−1​, 可得 Sn−1=xn−xn−1+⋯+x2−x1=xn−x1S_{n-1} = x_{n} - x_{n-1} + \dots + x_{2} - x_{1} = x_{n} - x_{1}Sn−1​=xn​−xn−1​+⋯+x2​−x1​=xn​−x1​. 因为 {Sn−1}\{ S_{n-1} \}{Sn−1​} 的极限存在, 故 lim⁡n→∞xn\lim\limits_{n \to \infty} x_{n}n→∞lim​xn​ 存在, 不妨设 lim⁡n→∞xn=a\lim\limits_{n \to \infty} x_{n} = an→∞lim​xn​=a. 由 xn+1=f(xn)(n=1,2,… )x_{n+1} = f(x_{n}) (n=1,2,\dots)xn+1​=f(xn​)(n=1,2,…) 两边同时求极限, 可得 a=f(a)a = f(a)a=f(a) 令 G(x)=f(x)−xG(x) = f(x) - xG(x)=f(x)−x, G(0)=f(0)−0=1>0G(0) = f(0) - 0 = 1 > 0G(0)=f(0)−0=1>0, G(2)=f(2)−2=2f′(ξ)−1<0G(2) = f(2) - 2 = 2 f'(\xi) - 1 < 0G(2)=f(2)−2=2f′(ξ)−1<0. 又因为 G′(x)=f′(x)−1<0G'(x) = f'(x) - 1 < 0G′(x)=f′(x)−1<0, 故 G(x)G(x)G(x) 在 (0,2)(0,2)(0,2) 中存在唯一的根.

(2023 数一三) 已知 an<bn(n=1,2,… )a_{n} < b_{n} (n=1,2,\dots)an​<bn​(n=1,2,…), 若级数 ∑n=1∞an\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} a_{n}n=1∑∞​an​ 与 ∑n=1∞bn\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} b_{n}n=1∑∞​bn​ 均收敛, 则 ∑n=1∞an\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} a_{n}n=1∑∞​an​ 绝对收敛是 ∑n=1∞bn\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} b_{n}n=1∑∞​bn​ 绝对收敛的
A. 充分必要条件
B. 充分不必要条件
C. 必要不充分条件
D. 既不充分也不必要条件

答案(A). 由级数 ∑n=1∞an\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} a_{n}n=1∑∞​an​ 与 ∑n=1∞bn\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} b_{n}n=1∑∞​bn​ 均收敛, 则 ∑n=1∞∣an−bn∣\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} | a_{n} - b_{n} |n=1∑∞​∣an​−bn​∣ 收敛 若 ∑n=1∞bn\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} b_{n}n=1∑∞​bn​ 绝对收敛, 由 ∣an∣=∣bn+an−bn∣≤∣bn∣+∣an−bn∣| a_{n} | = | b_{n} + a_{n} - b_{n} | \le | b_{n} | + | a_{n} - b_{n} |∣an​∣=∣bn​+an​−bn​∣≤∣bn​∣+∣an​−bn​∣, 可知 ∑n=1∞an\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} a_{n}n=1∑∞​an​ 绝对收敛 若 ∑n=1∞an\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} a_{n}n=1∑∞​an​ 绝对收敛, 由 ∣bn∣=∣an+bn−an∣≤∣an∣+∣bn−an∣| b_{n} | = | a_{n} + b_{n} - a_{n} | \le | a_{n} | + | b_{n} - a_{n} |∣bn​∣=∣an​+bn​−an​∣≤∣an​∣+∣bn​−an​∣, 可知 ∑n=1∞bn\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} b_{n}n=1∑∞​bn​ 绝对收敛 故选 (A)

幂级数

(2020 数一) 设 RRR 为幂级数 ∑n=1∞anxn\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} a_{n} x^{n}n=1∑∞​an​xn 的收敛半径, rrr 是实数, 则
A. 当 ∑n=1∞a2nr2n\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} a_{2n} r^{2n}n=1∑∞​a2n​r2n 发散时, ∣r∣≥R| r | \ge R∣r∣≥R
B. 当 ∑n=1∞a2nr2n\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} a_{2n} r^{2n}n=1∑∞​a2n​r2n 收敛时, ∣r∣≤R| r | \le R∣r∣≤R
C. 当 ∣r∣≥R| r | \ge R∣r∣≥R 时, ∑n=1∞a2nr2n\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} a_{2n} r^{2n}n=1∑∞​a2n​r2n 发散
D. 当 ∣r∣≤R| r | \le R∣r∣≤R 时, ∑n=1∞a2nr2n\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} a_{2n} r^{2n}n=1∑∞​a2n​r2n 收敛

答案(A) 正确. 由题意知, 当 ∣r∣<R| r | < R∣r∣<R 时, ∑n=1∞anrn\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} a_{n} r^{n}n=1∑∞​an​rn 绝对收敛, 而 ∑n=1∞∣anrn∣=∑n=1∞∣a2nr2n∣+∑n=1∞∣a2n−1r2n−1∣\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} | a_{n} r^{n} | = \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} | a_{2n} r^{2n} | + \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} | a_{2n-1} r^{2n-1} |n=1∑∞​∣an​rn∣=n=1∑∞​∣a2n​r2n∣+n=1∑∞​∣a2n−1​r2n−1∣, 故 ∑n=1∞a2nr2n\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} a_{2n} r^{2n}n=1∑∞​a2n​r2n 绝对收敛, 于是 ∑n=1∞a2nr2n\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} a_{2n} r^{2n}n=1∑∞​a2n​r2n 收敛, 因此, 当 ∑n=1∞a2nr2n\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} a_{2n} r^{2n}n=1∑∞​a2n​r2n 发散时, 必有 ∣r∣≥R| r | \ge R∣r∣≥R. (B) 错. 如取 ∑n=1∞anxn=∑n=1∞x2n+∑n=1∞22n−1x2n−1\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} a_{n} x^{n} = \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} x^{2n} + \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} 2^{2n-1} x^{2n-1}n=1∑∞​an​xn=n=1∑∞​x2n+n=1∑∞​22n−1x2n−1, 易知 ∑n=1∞x2n\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} x^{2n}n=1∑∞​x2n 的收敛半径 R1=1R_{1} = 1R1​=1, ∑n=1∞22n−1x2n−1\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} 2^{2n-1} x^{2n-1}n=1∑∞​22n−1x2n−1 的收敛半径 R2=12R_{2} = \dfrac{1}{2}R2​=21​, 因此 ∑n=1∞anxn\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} a_{n} x^{n}n=1∑∞​an​xn 的收敛半径 R=min⁡{R1,R2}=12R = \min \{ R_{1}, R_{2} \} = \dfrac{1}{2}R=min{R1​,R2​}=21​. 当 12<∣r∣<1\dfrac{1}{2} < | r | < 121​<∣r∣<1 时, ∑n=1∞a2nr2n=∑n=1∞r2n\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} a_{2n} r^{2n} = \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} r^{2n}n=1∑∞​a2n​r2n=n=1∑∞​r2n 收敛, 但 ∣r∣≥R| r | \ge R∣r∣≥R, 故 (B) 错. © 错. 同上例, 当 ∣r∣≥R=12| r | \ge R = \dfrac{1}{2}∣r∣≥R=21​ 但 ∣r∣<1| r | < 1∣r∣<1 时, ∑n=1∞a2nr2n\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} a_{2n} r^{2n}n=1∑∞​a2n​r2n 收敛, 故 © 错. (D) 错. 举例: 当 ∑n=1∞anxn=∑n=1∞xn\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} a_{n} x^{n} = \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} x^{n}n=1∑∞​an​xn=n=1∑∞​xn, 则 R=1R = 1R=1, 则当 r=R=1r = R = 1r=R=1 时, ∑n=1∞a2nr2n=∑n=1∞12n\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} a_{2n} r^{2n} = \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} 1^{2n}n=1∑∞​a2n​r2n=n=1∑∞​12n, 显然发散. 故 (D) 错.

(1987 数三) 将函数 f(x)=1x2−3x+2f(x) = \dfrac{1}{x^{2} - 3x + 2}f(x)=x2−3x+21​ 展开为 xxx 的级数, 并指出收敛区间.

答案f(x)=1x2−3x+2=1(x−1)(x−2)=1x−2−1x−1f(x) = \dfrac{1}{x^{2} - 3x + 2} = \dfrac{1}{(x-1)(x-2)} = \dfrac{1}{x-2} - \dfrac{1}{x-1}f(x)=x2−3x+21​=(x−1)(x−2)1​=x−21​−x−11​, 1x−2=−12⋅1(1−x2)=−12∑n=0∞(x2)n=−∑n=0∞xn2n+1,x∈(−2,2)\dfrac{1}{x-2} = - \dfrac{1}{2} \cdot \dfrac{1}{(1 - \dfrac{x}{2})} = - \dfrac{1}{2} \sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} (\dfrac{x}{2})^{n} = - \sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} \dfrac{x^{n}}{2^{n+1}}, x \in (-2,2)x−21​=−21​⋅(1−2x​)1​=−21​n=0∑∞​(2x​)n=−n=0∑∞​2n+1xn​,x∈(−2,2) 1x−1=−11−x=−∑n=0∞xn,x∈(−1,1)\dfrac{1}{x-1} = - \dfrac{1}{1-x} = - \sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} x^{n}, x \in (-1,1)x−11​=−1−x1​=−n=0∑∞​xn,x∈(−1,1) 故 f(x)=−∑n=0∞xn2n+1+∑n=0∞xn=∑n=0∞(1−12n+1)xn,x∈(−1,1)f(x) = - \sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} \dfrac{x^{n}}{2^{n+1}} + \sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} x^{n} = \sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} (1 - \dfrac{1}{2^{n+1}}) x^{n}, x \in (-1,1)f(x)=−n=0∑∞​2n+1xn​+n=0∑∞​xn=n=0∑∞​(1−2n+11​)xn,x∈(−1,1)

(1989 数一) 将函数 f(x)=arctan⁡1+x1−xf(x) = \arctan \dfrac{1+x}{1-x}f(x)=arctan1−x1+x​ 展开为 xxx 的幂级数.

答案直接展开 $ f(x) 相对比较麻烦,可相对比较麻烦, 可相对比较麻烦,可 f’(x) $ 容易展开. f′(x)=11+(1+x1−x)2⋅1−x−(1+x)⋅(−1)(1−x)2=2(1−x)2+(1+x)2=11+x2.f'(x) = \dfrac{1}{1 + (\dfrac{1 + x}{1 - x})^2} \cdot \dfrac{1 - x - (1 + x) \cdot (-1)}{(1 - x)^2} = \dfrac{2}{(1 - x)^2 + (1 + x)^2} = \dfrac{1}{1 + x^2} .f′(x)=1+(1−x1+x​)21​⋅(1−x)21−x−(1+x)⋅(−1)​=(1−x)2+(1+x)22​=1+x21​. 由 $ \dfrac{1}{1 + t} = 1 - t + t^2 - \dots + (-1)^n t^n + \dots = \sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} (-1)^n t^n , (|t| < 1) $, 令 t=x2t = x^2t=x2 得 11+t=11+x2=1−x2+x4−⋯+(−1)nx2n+⋯=∑n=0∞(−1)nx2n,(x2<1)\dfrac{1}{1 + t} = \dfrac{1}{1 + x^2} = 1 - x^2 + x^4 - \dots + (-1)^n x^{2n} + \dots = \sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} (-1)^n x^{2n} , (x^2 < 1)1+t1​=1+x21​=1−x2+x4−⋯+(−1)nx2n+⋯=n=0∑∞​(−1)nx2n,(x2<1), 即 f′(x)=11+x2=∑n=0∞(−1)nx2n,(∣x∣<1)f'(x) = \dfrac{1}{1 + x^2} = \sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} (-1)^n x^{2n} , (|x| < 1)f′(x)=1+x21​=n=0∑∞​(−1)nx2n,(∣x∣<1) 所以 $ f(x) = \int_{0}^{x} f’(u) du + f(0) , = \int_{0}^{x} \sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} (-1)^n u^{2n} du + \arctan \dfrac{1 + 0}{1 - 0} = \dfrac{\pi}{4} + \sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} (-1)^n \int_{0}^{x} u^{2n} du = \dfrac{\pi}{4} + \sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} (-1)^n \dfrac{x^{2n+1}}{2n + 1} , (|x| < 1) $ 当 x=±1x = \pm 1x=±1 时, 式 ∑n=0∞(−1)nx2n+12n+1\sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} (-1)^n \dfrac{x^{2n+1}}{2n + 1}n=0∑∞​(−1)n2n+1x2n+1​ 均收敛, 而左端 f(x)=arctan⁡1+x1−xf(x) = \arctan \dfrac{1 + x}{1 - x}f(x)=arctan1−x1+x​ 在 x=1x = 1x=1 处无定义. 因此 f(x)=arctan⁡1+x1−x=π4+∑n=0∞(−1)n2n+1x2n+1,x∈[−1,1).f(x) = \arctan \dfrac{1 + x}{1 - x} = \dfrac{\pi}{4} + \sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} \dfrac{(-1)^n}{2n + 1} x^{2n+1} , x \in [-1, 1) .f(x)=arctan1−x1+x​=4π​+n=0∑∞​2n+1(−1)n​x2n+1,x∈[−1,1).

(1994 数一) 将函数 f(x)=14ln⁡1+x1−x+12arctan⁡x−xf(x) = \dfrac{1}{4} \ln \dfrac{1 + x}{1 - x} + \dfrac{1}{2} \arctan x - xf(x)=41​ln1−x1+x​+21​arctanx−x 展开成 xxx 的幂级数.

答案f(x)=14ln⁡(1+x)−14ln⁡(1−x)+12arctan⁡x−x.f(x) = \dfrac{1}{4} \ln(1 + x) - \dfrac{1}{4} \ln(1 - x) + \dfrac{1}{2} \arctan x - x .f(x)=41​ln(1+x)−41​ln(1−x)+21​arctanx−x. 先求 f′(x)f'(x)f′(x) 的展开式. 将 f(x)f(x)f(x) 微分后, 可得简单的展开式, 再积分即得原函数的幂级数展开. 所以由 11+x=1−x+x2−x3+⋯+(−1)nxn+…,(−1<x<1)\dfrac{1}{1 + x} = 1 - x + x^2 - x^3 + \dots + (-1)^n x^n + \dots , (-1 < x < 1)1+x1​=1−x+x2−x3+⋯+(−1)nxn+…,(−1<x<1) 11−x=1+x+x2+x3+⋯+xn+…,(−1<x<1)\dfrac{1}{1 - x} = 1 + x + x^2 + x^3 + \dots + x^n + \dots , (-1 < x < 1)1−x1​=1+x+x2+x3+⋯+xn+…,(−1<x<1) 得 f′(x)=1411+x+1411−x+1211+x2−1=1211−x2+1211+x2−1=11−x4−1=∑n=0∞x4n−1=∑n=1∞x4n,(∣x∣<1),f'(x) = \dfrac{1}{4} \dfrac{1}{1 + x} + \dfrac{1}{4} \dfrac{1}{1 - x} + \dfrac{1}{2} \dfrac{1}{1 + x^2} - 1 = \dfrac{1}{2} \dfrac{1}{1 - x^2} + \dfrac{1}{2} \dfrac{1}{1 + x^2} - 1 = \dfrac{1}{1 - x^4} - 1 = \sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} x^{4n} - 1 = \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} x^{4n} , (|x| < 1) ,f′(x)=41​1+x1​+41​1−x1​+21​1+x21​−1=21​1−x21​+21​1+x21​−1=1−x41​−1=n=0∑∞​x4n−1=n=1∑∞​x4n,(∣x∣<1), 积分, 由牛顿-莱布尼茨公式得 f(x)=f(0)+∫0xf′(x)dx=∑n=1∞∫0xt4ndt=∑n=1∞x4n+14n+1(∣x∣<1).f(x) = f(0) + \int_{0}^{x} f'(x) dx = \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} \int_{0}^{x} t^{4n} dt = \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} \dfrac{x^{4n+1}}{4n + 1} (|x| < 1) .f(x)=f(0)+∫0x​f′(x)dx=n=1∑∞​∫0x​t4ndt=n=1∑∞​4n+1x4n+1​(∣x∣<1).

(1995 数三) 将函数 y=ln⁡(1−x−2x2)y = \ln(1 - x - 2x^2)y=ln(1−x−2x2) 展开成 xxx 的幂级数, 并指出其收敛区间.

答案由 1−x−2x2=(1−2x)(1+x)1 - x - 2x^2 = (1 - 2x)(1 + x)1−x−2x2=(1−2x)(1+x) 知 ln⁡(1−x−2x2)=ln⁡(1−2x)+ln⁡(1+x).\ln(1 - x - 2x^2) = \ln(1 - 2x) + \ln(1 + x) .ln(1−x−2x2)=ln(1−2x)+ln(1+x). 因为 ln⁡(1+x)=x−x22+x33−⋯+(−1)n+1xnn+…,\ln(1 + x) = x - \dfrac{x^2}{2} + \dfrac{x^3}{3} - \dots + (-1)^{n+1} \dfrac{x^n}{n} + \dots ,ln(1+x)=x−2x2​+3x3​−⋯+(−1)n+1nxn​+…, 其收敛区间为 (−1,1);(-1, 1) ;(−1,1); 又 ln⁡(1−2x)=(−2x)−(−2x)22+(−2x)33−⋯+(−1)n+1(−2x)nn+…,\ln(1 - 2x) = (-2x) - \dfrac{(-2x)^2}{2} + \dfrac{(-2x)^3}{3} - \dots + (-1)^{n+1} \dfrac{(-2x)^n}{n} + \dots ,ln(1−2x)=(−2x)−2(−2x)2​+3(−2x)3​−⋯+(−1)n+1n(−2x)n​+…, 其收敛区间为 (−12,12].(-\dfrac{1}{2}, \dfrac{1}{2}] .(−21​,21​]. 于是有 ln⁡(1−x−2x2)=∑n=1∞[(−1)n+1xnn+(−1)n+1(−2x)nn]=∑n=1∞(−1)n+1−2nnxn,\ln(1 - x - 2x^2) = \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} [(-1)^{n+1} \dfrac{x^n}{n} + (-1)^{n+1} \dfrac{(-2x)^n}{n}] = \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} \dfrac{(-1)^{n+1} - 2^n}{n} x^n ,ln(1−x−2x2)=n=1∑∞​[(−1)n+1nxn​+(−1)n+1n(−2x)n​]=n=1∑∞​n(−1)n+1−2n​xn, 其收敛区间为 (−12,12].(-\dfrac{1}{2}, \dfrac{1}{2}] .(−21​,21​].

(1987 数一) 求幂级数 ∑n=1∞1n⋅2nxn+1\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} \dfrac{1}{n \cdot 2^n} x^{n+1}n=1∑∞​n⋅2n1​xn+1 的收敛域, 并求其和函数.

答案先求收敛半径 lim⁡n→∞1n⋅2n1(n+1)⋅2n+1=lim⁡n→∞(n+1)⋅2n+1n⋅2n=2\lim\limits_{n \to \infty} \dfrac{\dfrac{1}{n \cdot 2^n}}{\dfrac{1}{(n + 1) \cdot 2^{n+1}}} = \lim\limits_{n \to \infty} \dfrac{(n + 1) \cdot 2^{n+1}}{n \cdot 2^n} = 2n→∞lim​(n+1)⋅2n+11​n⋅2n1​​=n→∞lim​n⋅2n(n+1)⋅2n+1​=2 故收敛半径 R=2R = 2R=2, 则收敛区间为: (−2,2).(-2, 2).(−2,2). 讨论端点的敛散性 当 x=2x = 2x=2 时, ∑n=1∞1n⋅2n2n+1=2∑n=1∞1n\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} \dfrac{1}{n \cdot 2^n} 2^{n+1} = 2 \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} \dfrac{1}{n}n=1∑∞​n⋅2n1​2n+1=2n=1∑∞​n1​, 故发散 当 x=−2x = -2x=−2 时, ∑n=1∞1n⋅2n(−2)n+1=2∑n=1∞(−1)n+1n\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} \dfrac{1}{n \cdot 2^n} (-2)^{n+1} = 2 \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} \dfrac{(-1)^{n+1}}{n}n=1∑∞​n⋅2n1​(−2)n+1=2n=1∑∞​n(−1)n+1​, 由莱布尼茨收敛定理知收敛. 故收敛域为: [−2,2)[-2, 2)[−2,2) 再求和函数 S(x)=∑n=1∞1n⋅2nxn+1=x∑n=1∞1n⋅(x2)n=xS1(x)S(x) = \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} \dfrac{1}{n \cdot 2^n} x^{n+1} = x \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} \dfrac{1}{n} \cdot (\dfrac{x}{2})^n = x S_1(x)S(x)=n=1∑∞​n⋅2n1​xn+1=xn=1∑∞​n1​⋅(2x​)n=xS1​(x) 再令 t=x2t = \dfrac{x}{2}t=2x​, 则 S1(x)=φ(t)=∑n=1∞tnnS_1(x) = \varphi(t) = \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} \dfrac{t^n}{n}S1​(x)=φ(t)=n=1∑∞​ntn​, 即 φ′(t)=∑n=1∞tn−1=11−t\varphi'(t) = \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} t^{n-1} = \dfrac{1}{1 - t}φ′(t)=n=1∑∞​tn−1=1−t1​, 所以 φ(t)=∫0t11−udu+φ(0)=−ln⁡(1−t)\varphi(t) = \int_{0}^{t} \dfrac{1}{1 - u} du + \varphi(0) = -\ln(1 - t)φ(t)=∫0t​1−u1​du+φ(0)=−ln(1−t) 则 S1(x)=ln⁡22−xS_1(x) = \ln \dfrac{2}{2 - x}S1​(x)=ln2−x2​ 综上, S(x)=xln⁡22−x,x∈[−2,2)S(x) = x \ln \dfrac{2}{2 - x} , x \in [-2, 2)S(x)=xln2−x2​,x∈[−2,2)

(1993 数一) 求级数 ∑n=0∞(−1)n(n2−n+1)2n\sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} \dfrac{(-1)^n (n^2 - n + 1)}{2^n}n=0∑∞​2n(−1)n(n2−n+1)​ 的和.

答案先将级数分解, A=∑n=0∞(−1)n(n2−n+1)2n=∑n=0∞(−1)nn(n−1)2n+∑n=0∞(−12)n.A = \sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} \dfrac{(-1)^n (n^2 - n + 1)}{2^n} = \sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} \dfrac{(-1)^n n(n - 1)}{2^n} + \sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} (-\dfrac{1}{2})^n .A=n=0∑∞​2n(−1)n(n2−n+1)​=n=0∑∞​2n(−1)nn(n−1)​+n=0∑∞​(−21​)n., 第二个级数是几何级数, 它的和已知 ∑n=0∞(−12)n=11−(−12)=23.\sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} (-\dfrac{1}{2})^n = \dfrac{1}{1 - (-\dfrac{1}{2})} = \dfrac{2}{3} .n=0∑∞​(−21​)n=1−(−21​)1​=32​. 求第一个级数的和转化为幂级数求和. 考察 ∑n=0∞(−1)nxn=11+x(∣x∣<1).\sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} (-1)^n x^n = \dfrac{1}{1 + x} (|x| < 1) .n=0∑∞​(−1)nxn=1+x1​(∣x∣<1). S(x)=∑n=0∞(−1)nn(n−1)xn−2=(∑n=0∞(−1)nxn)′′=(11+x)′′=2(1+x)3,S(x) = \sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} (-1)^n n(n - 1) x^{n-2} = (\sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} (-1)^n x^n)'' = (\dfrac{1}{1 + x})'' = \dfrac{2}{(1 + x)^3} ,S(x)=n=0∑∞​(−1)nn(n−1)xn−2=(n=0∑∞​(−1)nxn)′′=(1+x1​)′′=(1+x)32​, 所以 ∑n=0∞(−1)nn(n−1)2n=122S(12)=142(1+12)3=427.\sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} \dfrac{(-1)^n n(n - 1)}{2^n} = \dfrac{1}{2^2} S(\dfrac{1}{2}) = \dfrac{1}{4} \dfrac{2}{(1 + \dfrac{1}{2})^3} = \dfrac{4}{27} .n=0∑∞​2n(−1)nn(n−1)​=221​S(21​)=41​(1+21​)32​=274​. 因此原级数的和 A=427+23=2227.A = \dfrac{4}{27} + \dfrac{2}{3} = \dfrac{22}{27} .A=274​+32​=2722​.

(2006 数三) 求幂级数 ∑n=1∞(−1)n−1x2n+1n(2n−1)\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} \dfrac{(-1)^{n-1} x^{2n+1}}{n(2n - 1)}n=1∑∞​n(2n−1)(−1)n−1x2n+1​ 的收敛域及和函数 S(x).S(x) .S(x).

答案记 un=(−1)n−1x2n+1n(2n−1)u_n = \dfrac{(-1)^{n-1} x^{2n+1}}{n(2n - 1)}un​=n(2n−1)(−1)n−1x2n+1​, 有 lim⁡n→∞∣un+1un∣=x2\lim\limits_{n \to \infty} |\dfrac{u_{n+1}}{u_n}| = x^2n→∞lim​∣un​un+1​​∣=x2 所以, 当 x2<1x^2 < 1x2<1 即 ∣x∣<1|x| < 1∣x∣<1 时, 原级数绝对收敛; 当 x2>1x^2 > 1x2>1, 即 ∣x∣>1|x| > 1∣x∣>1 时, 原级数通项不趋于 0, 级数发散, 即收敛半径 R=1.R = 1 .R=1. 在 x=±1x = \pm 1x=±1 处 un=±(−1)n−1n(2n−1)u_n = \dfrac{\pm (-1)^{n-1}}{n(2n - 1)}un​=n(2n−1)±(−1)n−1​, 级数 ∑n=1∞un\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} u_nn=1∑∞​un​ 绝对收敛, 故收敛域为 [−1,1].[-1, 1] .[−1,1]. 求和函数 S(x)S(x)S(x), 应在收敛区间内进行, 即 x∈[−1,1],x \in [-1, 1] ,x∈[−1,1], 由 S(x)=∑n=1∞(−1)n−1x2n+1n(2n−1)=x∑n=1∞(−1)n−1x2nn(2n−1)=xS1(x)S(x) = \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} \dfrac{(-1)^{n-1} x^{2n+1}}{n(2n - 1)} = x \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} \dfrac{(-1)^{n-1} x^{2n}}{n(2n - 1)} = x S_1(x)S(x)=n=1∑∞​n(2n−1)(−1)n−1x2n+1​=xn=1∑∞​n(2n−1)(−1)n−1x2n​=xS1​(x) 有 S1′(x)=(∑n=1∞(−1)n−1x2nn(2n−1))′=2∑n=1∞(−1)n−1x2n−1(2n−1)S_1'(x) = (\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} \dfrac{(-1)^{n-1} x^{2n}}{n(2n - 1)})' = 2 \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} \dfrac{(-1)^{n-1} x^{2n-1}}{(2n - 1)}S1′​(x)=(n=1∑∞​n(2n−1)(−1)n−1x2n​)′=2n=1∑∞​(2n−1)(−1)n−1x2n−1​ S1′′(x)=(2∑n=1∞(−1)n−1x2n−1(2n−1))′=2∑n=1∞(−1)n−1x2n−2=21+x2S_1''(x) = (2 \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} \dfrac{(-1)^{n-1} x^{2n-1}}{(2n - 1)})' = 2 \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} (-1)^{n-1} x^{2n-2} = \dfrac{2}{1 + x^2}S1′′​(x)=(2n=1∑∞​(2n−1)(−1)n−1x2n−1​)′=2n=1∑∞​(−1)n−1x2n−2=1+x22​ 再积分即得, 有 S1′(x)=S1′(0)+∫0xS1′′(t)dt=0+∫0x21+t2dt=2arctan⁡xS_1'(x) = S_1'(0) + \int_{0}^{x} S_1''(t) dt = 0 + \int_{0}^{x} \dfrac{2}{1 + t^2} dt = 2 \arctan xS1′​(x)=S1′​(0)+∫0x​S1′′​(t)dt=0+∫0x​1+t22​dt=2arctanx, S1(x)=S1(0)+∫0xS1′(t)dt=0+2∫0xarctan⁡tdt=2xarctan⁡x−ln⁡(1+x2)S_1(x) = S_1(0) + \int_{0}^{x} S_1'(t) dt = 0 + 2 \int_{0}^{x} \arctan t dt = 2x \arctan x - \ln(1 + x^2)S1​(x)=S1​(0)+∫0x​S1′​(t)dt=0+2∫0x​arctantdt=2xarctanx−ln(1+x2) 于是 S(x)=∑n=1∞(−1)n−1x2n+1n(2n−1)=2x2arctan⁡x−xln⁡(1+x2),x∈[−1,1].S(x) = \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} \dfrac{(-1)^{n-1} x^{2n+1}}{n(2n - 1)} = 2x^2 \arctan x - x \ln(1 + x^2) , x \in [-1, 1] .S(x)=n=1∑∞​n(2n−1)(−1)n−1x2n+1​=2x2arctanx−xln(1+x2),x∈[−1,1].

(2012 数一) 求幂级数 ∑n=0∞4n2+4n+32n+1x2n\sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} \dfrac{4n^2 + 4n + 3}{2n + 1} x^{2n}n=0∑∞​2n+14n2+4n+3​x2n 的收敛域及和函数.

答案R=lim⁡n→∞∣anan+1∣=lim⁡n→∞∣4n2+4n+32n+14(n+1)2+4(n+1)+32(n+1)+1∣=lim⁡n→∞∣4n2+4n+32n+1⋅(2n+1)+14(n+1)2+4(n+1)+3∣=1R = \lim\limits_{n \to \infty} |\dfrac{a_n}{a_{n+1}}| = \lim\limits_{n \to \infty} |\dfrac{\dfrac{4n^2 + 4n + 3}{2n + 1}}{\dfrac{4(n + 1)^2 + 4(n + 1) + 3}{2(n + 1) + 1}}| = \lim\limits_{n \to \infty} |\dfrac{4n^2 + 4n + 3}{2n + 1} \cdot \dfrac{(2n + 1) + 1}{4(n + 1)^2 + 4(n + 1) + 3}| = 1R=n→∞lim​∣an+1​an​​∣=n→∞lim​∣2(n+1)+14(n+1)2+4(n+1)+3​2n+14n2+4n+3​​∣=n→∞lim​∣2n+14n2+4n+3​⋅4(n+1)2+4(n+1)+3(2n+1)+1​∣=1 易知当 x=1,x=−1x = 1, x = -1x=1,x=−1 级数 ∑n=0∞4n2+4n+32n+1x2n\sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} \dfrac{4n^2 + 4n + 3}{2n + 1} x^{2n}n=0∑∞​2n+14n2+4n+3​x2n 发散, 可知收敛域为 x∈(−1,1)x \in (-1, 1)x∈(−1,1) 下面在计算幂级数的和函数: ∑n=0∞4n2+4n+32n+1x2n=∑n=0∞(2n+1)2+22n+1x2n=∑n=0∞(2n+1)x2n+∑n=0∞22n+1x2n\sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} \dfrac{4n^2 + 4n + 3}{2n + 1} x^{2n} = \sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} \dfrac{(2n + 1)^2 + 2}{2n + 1} x^{2n} = \sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} (2n + 1) x^{2n} + \sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} \dfrac{2}{2n + 1} x^{2n}n=0∑∞​2n+14n2+4n+3​x2n=n=0∑∞​2n+1(2n+1)2+2​x2n=n=0∑∞​(2n+1)x2n+n=0∑∞​2n+12​x2n 其中, ∑n=0∞(2n+1)x2n={∫0x[∑n=0∞(2n+1)t2n]dt}′={∑n=0∞(2n+1)∫0xt2ndt}′=(∑n=0∞x2n+1)′=(x1−x2)′=1+x2(1−x2)2\sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} (2n + 1) x^{2n} = \{ \int_{0}^{x} [\sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} (2n + 1) t^{2n}] dt \}' = \{ \sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} (2n + 1) \int_{0}^{x} t^{2n} dt \}' = (\sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} x^{2n+1})' = (\dfrac{x}{1 - x^2})' = \dfrac{1 + x^2}{(1 - x^2)^2}n=0∑∞​(2n+1)x2n={∫0x​[n=0∑∞​(2n+1)t2n]dt}′={n=0∑∞​(2n+1)∫0x​t2ndt}′=(n=0∑∞​x2n+1)′=(1−x2x​)′=(1−x2)21+x2​ 令 S1(x)=∑n=0∞22n+1x2nS_1(x) = \sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} \dfrac{2}{2n + 1} x^{2n}S1​(x)=n=0∑∞​2n+12​x2n 则 xS1(x)=2∑n=0∞x2n+12n+1.x S_1(x) = 2 \sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} \dfrac{x^{2n+1}}{2n + 1} .xS1​(x)=2n=0∑∞​2n+1x2n+1​. 根据逐项求导定理可知 [xS1(x)]′=2∑n=0∞x2n=21−x2,[x S_1(x)]' = 2 \sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} x^{2n} = \dfrac{2}{1 - x^2} ,[xS1​(x)]′=2n=0∑∞​x2n=1−x22​, 故 xS1(x)=2∫0xdt1−t2=ln⁡(1+x1−x),x S_1(x) = 2 \int_{0}^{x} \dfrac{dt}{1 - t^2} = \ln (\dfrac{1 + x}{1 - x}) ,xS1​(x)=2∫0x​1−t2dt​=ln(1−x1+x​), 故当 x≠0x \neq 0x=0 时, 有 S1(x)=1xln⁡(1+x1−x),S_1(x) = \dfrac{1}{x} \ln (\dfrac{1 + x}{1 - x}) ,S1​(x)=x1​ln(1−x1+x​), 而当 x=0x = 0x=0 时, 有 S1(0)=2S_1(0) = 2S1​(0)=2 综上可得 ∑n=0∞4n2+4n+32n+1x2n={1+x2(1−x2)2+1xln⁡(1+x1−x),−1<x<0∪0<x<13,x=0\sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} \dfrac{4n^2 + 4n + 3}{2n + 1} x^{2n} = \begin{cases} \dfrac{1 + x^2}{(1 - x^2)^2} + \dfrac{1}{x} \ln (\dfrac{1 + x}{1 - x}) , & -1 < x < 0 \cup 0 < x < 1 \\ 3 , & x = 0 \end{cases}n=0∑∞​2n+14n2+4n+3​x2n=⎩⎨⎧​(1−x2)21+x2​+x1​ln(1−x1+x​),3,​−1<x<0∪0<x<1x=0​

(2014 数三) 求幂级数 ∑n=0∞(n+1)(n+3)xn\sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} (n + 1)(n + 3)x^nn=0∑∞​(n+1)(n+3)xn 的收敛域及和函数.

答案由 lim⁡n→∞(n+2)(n+4)(n+1)(n+3)=1\lim\limits_{n \to \infty} \dfrac{(n+2)(n+4)}{(n+1)(n+3)} = 1n→∞lim​(n+1)(n+3)(n+2)(n+4)​=1 , 得 R=1R = 1R=1 当 x=1x = 1x=1 时, ∑n=0∞(n+1)(n+3)\sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} (n+1)(n+3)n=0∑∞​(n+1)(n+3) 发散, 当 x=−1x = -1x=−1 时, ∑n=0∞(−1)n(n+1)(n+3)\sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} (-1)^{n}(n+1)(n+3)n=0∑∞​(−1)n(n+1)(n+3) 发散, 故收敛域为 (−1,1)(-1,1)(−1,1) x≠0x \neq 0x=0 时, ∑n=0∞(n+1)(n+3)xn=(∑n=0∞(n+3)∫0x(n+1)xndx)′=(∑n=0∞(n+3)xn+1)′=(1x∑n=0∞(n+3)xn+2)′=(1x(∑n=0∞∫0x(n+3)xn+2dx)′)′=(1x(∑n=0∞xn+3)′)′=(1x(x31−x)′)′=(3x−2x2(1−x)2)′=3−x(1−x)3=s(x)\sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} (n+1)(n+3)x^{n} = (\sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} (n+3) \int_{0}^{x} (n+1)x^{n} dx)' = (\sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} (n+3)x^{n+1})' = (\dfrac{1}{x} \sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} (n+3)x^{n+2})' = (\dfrac{1}{x} (\sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} \int_{0}^{x} (n+3)x^{n+2} dx)')' = (\dfrac{1}{x} (\sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} x^{n+3})')' = (\dfrac{1}{x} (\dfrac{x^{3}}{1-x})')' = (\dfrac{3x-2x^{2}}{(1-x)^{2}})' = \dfrac{3-x}{(1-x)^{3}} = s(x)n=0∑∞​(n+1)(n+3)xn=(n=0∑∞​(n+3)∫0x​(n+1)xndx)′=(n=0∑∞​(n+3)xn+1)′=(x1​n=0∑∞​(n+3)xn+2)′=(x1​(n=0∑∞​∫0x​(n+3)xn+2dx)′)′=(x1​(n=0∑∞​xn+3)′)′=(x1​(1−xx3​)′)′=((1−x)23x−2x2​)′=(1−x)33−x​=s(x) x=0x = 0x=0 时, S(x)=3S(x) = 3S(x)=3 , 故和函数 S(x)=3−x(1−x)3,x∈(−1,1)S(x) = \dfrac{3-x}{(1-x)^{3}}, x \in (-1,1)S(x)=(1−x)33−x​,x∈(−1,1)

(2016 数三) 求幂级数 ∑n=0∞x2n+2(n+1)(2n+1)\sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} \dfrac{x^{2n+2}}{(n+1)(2n+1)}n=0∑∞​(n+1)(2n+1)x2n+2​ 的收敛域及和函数.

答案令 S(x)=∑n=0∞x2n+2(n+1)(2n+1)S(x) = \sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} \dfrac{x^{2n+2}}{(n+1)(2n+1)}S(x)=n=0∑∞​(n+1)(2n+1)x2n+2​ 两边同时求导得 S′(x)=2∑n=0∞x2n+1(2n+1)S'(x) = 2 \sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} \dfrac{x^{2n+1}}{(2n+1)}S′(x)=2n=0∑∞​(2n+1)x2n+1​ 两边同时再求导得 S′′(x)=2∑n=0∞x2n=21−x2,x∈(−1,1)S''(x) = 2 \sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} x^{2n} = \dfrac{2}{1-x^{2}}, x \in (-1,1)S′′(x)=2n=0∑∞​x2n=1−x22​,x∈(−1,1) 两边积分可得, 且 S′(0)=0S'(0) = 0S′(0)=0 S′(x)=∫0xS′(t)dt+S′(0)=∫0x21−t2dt=ln⁡1+x1−x=ln⁡(1+x)−ln⁡(1−x)S'(x) = \int_{0}^{x} S'(t) dt + S'(0) = \int_{0}^{x} \dfrac{2}{1-t^{2}} dt = \ln \dfrac{1+x}{1-x} = \ln(1+x) - \ln(1-x)S′(x)=∫0x​S′(t)dt+S′(0)=∫0x​1−t22​dt=ln1−x1+x​=ln(1+x)−ln(1−x) 两边再积分可知, S(0)=0S(0) = 0S(0)=0 S(x)=∫0xS′(t)dt+S(0)=(1+x)ln⁡(1+x)+(1−x)ln⁡(1−x)S(x) = \int_{0}^{x} S'(t) dt + S(0) = (1+x)\ln(1+x) + (1-x)\ln(1-x)S(x)=∫0x​S′(t)dt+S(0)=(1+x)ln(1+x)+(1−x)ln(1−x) 易知, S(x)=∑n=0∞x2n+2(n+1)(2n+1)S(x) = \sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} \dfrac{x^{2n+2}}{(n+1)(2n+1)}S(x)=n=0∑∞​(n+1)(2n+1)x2n+2​ 的收敛半径为 1,且当 x=1,x=−1x = 1, x = -1x=1,x=−1 时级数收敛, 可知幂级数的收敛域为 [−1,1][-1,1][−1,1] 当 x=±1x = \pm 1x=±1 时, S(±1)=∑n=0∞1(n+1)(2n+1)=2∑n=0∞1(2n+2)(2n+1)=2∑n=0∞(12n+1−12n+2)=2(1−12+13−14+15−16+⋯ )=2ln⁡(1+x)∣x=1=2ln⁡2S(\pm 1) = \sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} \dfrac{1}{(n+1)(2n+1)} = 2 \sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} \dfrac{1}{(2n+2)(2n+1)} = 2 \sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} (\dfrac{1}{2n+1} - \dfrac{1}{2n+2}) = 2(1 - \dfrac{1}{2} + \dfrac{1}{3} - \dfrac{1}{4} + \dfrac{1}{5} - \dfrac{1}{6} + \cdots) = 2 \ln(1+x)|_{x=1} = 2 \ln 2S(±1)=n=0∑∞​(n+1)(2n+1)1​=2n=0∑∞​(2n+2)(2n+1)1​=2n=0∑∞​(2n+11​−2n+21​)=2(1−21​+31​−41​+51​−61​+⋯)=2ln(1+x)∣x=1​=2ln2 因此, S(x)={(1+x)ln⁡(1+x)+(1−x)ln⁡(1−x)−1<x<12ln⁡2x=±1S(x) = \begin{cases} (1+x)\ln(1+x) + (1-x)\ln(1-x) & -1 < x < 1 \\ 2 \ln 2 & x = \pm 1 \end{cases}S(x)={(1+x)ln(1+x)+(1−x)ln(1−x)2ln2​−1<x<1x=±1​

(2021 数一) 设 un(x)=e−nx+xn+1n(n+1)(n=1,2,⋯ )u_{n}(x) = e^{-nx} + \dfrac{x^{n+1}}{n(n+1)} (n=1,2,\cdots)un​(x)=e−nx+n(n+1)xn+1​(n=1,2,⋯) , 求级数 ∑n=1∞un(x)\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} u_{n}(x)n=1∑∞​un​(x) 的收敛域及和函数

答案易得 ∑n=1∞un(x)=∑n=1∞(e−nx+xn+1n(n+1))=∑n=1∞e−nx+∑n=1∞xn+1n(n+1)=S1(x)+S2(x)\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} u_{n}(x) = \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} (e^{-nx} + \dfrac{x^{n+1}}{n(n+1)}) = \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} e^{-nx} + \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} \dfrac{x^{n+1}}{n(n+1)} = S_{1}(x) + S_{2}(x)n=1∑∞​un​(x)=n=1∑∞​(e−nx+n(n+1)xn+1​)=n=1∑∞​e−nx+n=1∑∞​n(n+1)xn+1​=S1​(x)+S2​(x) (1) 先求收敛域 S1(x)=∑n=1∞e−nxS_{1}(x) = \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} e^{-nx}S1​(x)=n=1∑∞​e−nx , 由于 lim⁡n→∞un+1(x)un(x)=lim⁡n→∞e−(n+1)xe−nx=e−x\lim\limits_{n \to \infty} \dfrac{u_{n+1}(x)}{u_{n}(x)} = \lim\limits_{n \to \infty} \dfrac{e^{-(n+1)x}}{e^{-nx}} = e^{-x}n→∞lim​un​(x)un+1​(x)​=n→∞lim​e−nxe−(n+1)x​=e−x 有正项级数的比值法得, 当 e−x<1e^{-x} < 1e−x<1 时, 即 x>0x > 0x>0 时 ∑n=1∞e−nx\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} e^{-nx}n=1∑∞​e−nx 收敛 S2(x)=∑n=1∞xn+1n(n+1)S_{2}(x) = \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} \dfrac{x^{n+1}}{n(n+1)}S2​(x)=n=1∑∞​n(n+1)xn+1​ , 得 lim⁡n→∞1n(n+1)n=1\lim\limits_{n \to \infty} \sqrt[n]{\dfrac{1}{n(n+1)}} = 1n→∞lim​nn(n+1)1​​=1 , 且当 x=±1x = \pm 1x=±1 时也是收敛的, 得 S2(x)S_{2}(x)S2​(x) 的收敛域为 [−1,1][-1,1][−1,1] 故 S(x)=S1(x)+S2(x)S(x) = S_{1}(x) + S_{2}(x)S(x)=S1​(x)+S2​(x) 的收敛域为 (0,1](0,1](0,1], (2) 再求和函数 由等比级数的和函数得 S1(x)=∑n=1∞e−nx=∑n=1∞(e−x)n=1ex−1S_{1}(x) = \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} e^{-nx} = \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} (e^{-x})^{n} = \dfrac{1}{e^{x}-1}S1​(x)=n=1∑∞​e−nx=n=1∑∞​(e−x)n=ex−11​ 由 S2(x)=∑n=1∞xn+1n(n+1)S_{2}(x) = \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} \dfrac{x^{n+1}}{n(n+1)}S2​(x)=n=1∑∞​n(n+1)xn+1​ 得 S2′(x)=∑n=1∞xnn,S2′′(x)=∑n=1∞xn−1=11−x,x∈(0,1)S'_{2}(x) = \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} \dfrac{x^{n}}{n}, S''_{2}(x) = \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} x^{n-1} = \dfrac{1}{1-x}, x \in (0,1)S2′​(x)=n=1∑∞​nxn​,S2′′​(x)=n=1∑∞​xn−1=1−x1​,x∈(0,1) 则 S2′(x)=∫0xS2′′(t)dt=∫0x11−tdt=−ln⁡(1−x)S'_{2}(x) = \int_{0}^{x} S''_{2}(t) dt = \int_{0}^{x} \dfrac{1}{1-t} dt = -\ln(1-x)S2′​(x)=∫0x​S2′′​(t)dt=∫0x​1−t1​dt=−ln(1−x) S2(x)=∫0xS2′(t)dt=∫0x−ln⁡(1−t)dt=x+(1−x)ln⁡(1−x)x∈(0,1)S_{2}(x) = \int_{0}^{x} S'_{2}(t) dt = \int_{0}^{x} -\ln(1-t) dt = x + (1-x)\ln(1-x) \quad x \in (0,1)S2​(x)=∫0x​S2′​(t)dt=∫0x​−ln(1−t)dt=x+(1−x)ln(1−x)x∈(0,1) 即当 x∈(0,1)x \in (0,1)x∈(0,1) 时, S(x)=S1(x)+S2(x)=e−x1−e−x+x+(1−x)ln⁡(1−x)S(x) = S_{1}(x) + S_{2}(x) = \dfrac{e^{-x}}{1-e^{-x}} + x + (1-x)\ln(1-x)S(x)=S1​(x)+S2​(x)=1−e−xe−x​+x+(1−x)ln(1−x), 当 x=1x = 1x=1 时, S(1)=S1(1)+S2(1)S(1) = S_{1}(1) + S_{2}(1)S(1)=S1​(1)+S2​(1) S1(1)=∑n=1∞e−n=∑n=1∞(e−1)n=e−11−e−1S_{1}(1) = \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} e^{-n} = \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} (e^{-1})^{n} = \dfrac{e^{-1}}{1-e^{-1}}S1​(1)=n=1∑∞​e−n=n=1∑∞​(e−1)n=1−e−1e−1​ , S2(1)=∑n=1∞1n(n+1)=∑n=1∞(1n−1n+1)=1S_{2}(1) = \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} \dfrac{1}{n(n+1)} = \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} (\dfrac{1}{n} - \dfrac{1}{n+1}) = 1S2​(1)=n=1∑∞​n(n+1)1​=n=1∑∞​(n1​−n+11​)=1 S(1)=e−11−e−1+1=ee−1S(1) = \dfrac{e^{-1}}{1-e^{-1}} + 1 = \dfrac{e}{e-1}S(1)=1−e−1e−1​+1=e−1e​ 综上, S(x)S(x)S(x) 的收敛域为 (0,1](0,1](0,1] , 且和函数为 S(x)={1ex−1+(1−x)ln⁡(1−x)+x,x∈(0,1)ee−1,x=1S(x) = \begin{cases} \dfrac{1}{e^{x}-1} + (1-x)\ln(1-x) + x, x \in (0,1) \\ \dfrac{e}{e-1}, & x = 1 \end{cases}S(x)=⎩⎨⎧​ex−11​+(1−x)ln(1−x)+x,x∈(0,1)e−1e​,​x=1​

(2021 数三) 设 nnn 为正整数, y=yn(x)y = y_{n}(x)y=yn​(x) 是微分方程 xy′−(n+1)y=0xy' - (n+1)y = 0xy′−(n+1)y=0 满足条件 yn(1)=1n(n+1)y_{n}(1) = \dfrac{1}{n(n+1)}yn​(1)=n(n+1)1​ 的解. 求: (1) yn(x)y_{n}(x)yn​(x). (2) 级数 ∑n=1∞yn(x)\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} y_{n}(x)n=1∑∞​yn​(x) 的收敛域及和函数.

答案(1) 由 xy′−(n+1)y=0xy' - (n+1)y = 0xy′−(n+1)y=0 得 dyy=(n+1)dxx\dfrac{dy}{y} = \dfrac{(n+1)dx}{x}ydy​=x(n+1)dx​ 两边积分得 ln⁡∣y∣=(n+1)ln⁡∣x∣+ln⁡C1\ln|y| = (n+1)\ln|x| + \ln C_{1}ln∣y∣=(n+1)ln∣x∣+lnC1​ , 整理得 ∣y∣=C1∣x∣n+1|y| = C_{1}|x|^{n+1}∣y∣=C1​∣x∣n+1 , 即得 y=Cxn+1y = Cx^{n+1}y=Cxn+1, 又因为 yn(1)=1n(n+1)y_{n}(1) = \dfrac{1}{n(n+1)}yn​(1)=n(n+1)1​ , 代入得 C=1n(n+1)C = \dfrac{1}{n(n+1)}C=n(n+1)1​ 即 yn(x)=1n(n+1)xn+1y_{n}(x) = \dfrac{1}{n(n+1)} x^{n+1}yn​(x)=n(n+1)1​xn+1 (2) 易得 R=lim⁡n→∞∣anan+1∣=lim⁡n→∞(n+1)(n+2)n(n+1)=1R = \lim\limits_{n \to \infty} |\dfrac{a_{n}}{a_{n+1}}| = \lim\limits_{n \to \infty} \dfrac{(n+1)(n+2)}{n(n+1)} = 1R=n→∞lim​∣an+1​an​​∣=n→∞lim​n(n+1)(n+1)(n+2)​=1 当 x=±1x = \pm 1x=±1 时, ∑n=1∞1n(n+1)xn+1\sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} \dfrac{1}{n(n+1)} x^{n+1}n=1∑∞​n(n+1)1​xn+1 易得收敛, 故收敛域为 [−1,1][-1,1][−1,1] 下求和函数 令 S(x)=∑n=1∞1n(n+1)xn+1S(x) = \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} \dfrac{1}{n(n+1)} x^{n+1}S(x)=n=1∑∞​n(n+1)1​xn+1 则 S′(x)=∑n=1∞1nxn,S′′(x)=∑n=1∞xn−1S'(x) = \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} \dfrac{1}{n} x^{n}, S''(x) = \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} x^{n-1}S′(x)=n=1∑∞​n1​xn,S′′(x)=n=1∑∞​xn−1, 而 S′′(x)=∑n=1∞xn−1=11−xS''(x) = \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} x^{n-1} = \dfrac{1}{1-x}S′′(x)=n=1∑∞​xn−1=1−x1​ , 且 S′(0)=0S'(0) = 0S′(0)=0 , 则 S′(x)=∫0xS′′(t)dt+S′(0)=∫0x11−tdt=−ln⁡(1−x)S'(x) = \int_{0}^{x} S''(t) dt + S'(0) = \int_{0}^{x} \dfrac{1}{1-t} dt = -\ln(1-x)S′(x)=∫0x​S′′(t)dt+S′(0)=∫0x​1−t1​dt=−ln(1−x) 且 S(0)=0S(0) = 0S(0)=0 , 则 S(x)=∫0xS′(t)dt+S(0)=∫0x−ln⁡(1−t)dt=x+(1−x)ln⁡(1−x)x∈[−1,1)S(x) = \int_{0}^{x} S'(t) dt + S(0) = \int_{0}^{x} -\ln(1-t) dt = x + (1-x)\ln(1-x) \quad x \in [-1,1)S(x)=∫0x​S′(t)dt+S(0)=∫0x​−ln(1−t)dt=x+(1−x)ln(1−x)x∈[−1,1) 而 S(1)=∑n=1∞1n(n+1)=1S(1) = \sum\limits_{n=1}^{\infty} \dfrac{1}{n(n+1)} = 1S(1)=n=1∑∞​n(n+1)1​=1 , 综上 S(x)={x+(1−x)ln⁡(1−x)x∈[−1,1)1x=1S(x) = \begin{cases} x + (1-x)\ln(1-x) & x \in [-1,1) \\ 1 & x = 1 \end{cases}S(x)={x+(1−x)ln(1−x)1​x∈[−1,1)x=1​

(2023 数三) ∑n=0∞x2n(2n)!=‾.\sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} \dfrac{x^{2n}}{(2n)!} = \underline{\hspace{2cm}}.n=0∑∞​(2n)!x2n​=​.

答案由麦克劳林级数得 $e^{x} = 1 + x + \dfrac{x^{2}}{2!} + \dfrac{x^{3}}{3!} + \dfrac{x^{4}}{4!} + … $, $e^{-x} = 1 - x + \dfrac{x^{2}}{2!} - \dfrac{x^{3}}{3!} + \dfrac{x^{4}}{4!} + … $, 两式相加得 ex+e−x=2(1+x22!+x44!+...)⇒ex+e−x2=∑n=0∞x2n(2n)!e^{x} + e^{-x} = 2(1 + \dfrac{x^{2}}{2!} + \dfrac{x^{4}}{4!} + ...) \Rightarrow \dfrac{e^{x} + e^{-x}}{2} = \sum\limits_{n=0}^{\infty} \dfrac{x^{2n}}{(2n)!}ex+e−x=2(1+2!x2​+4!x4​+...)⇒2ex+e−x​=n=0∑∞​(2n)!x2n​

傅里叶级数

三重积分

(1991 数一) ∭Ω(x2+y2+z)dv\iiint\limits_{\Omega} (x^2 + y^2 + z) \mathrm{d}vΩ∭​(x2+y2+z)dv, 其中 Ω\OmegaΩ 是由曲线 {y2=2z,x=0\begin{cases} y^2 = 2z, \\ x = 0 \end{cases}{y2=2z,x=0​ 绕 zzz 轴旋转一周而成的曲面与平面 z=4z = 4z=4 所围成的立体.

答案由曲线 {y2=2z,x=0\begin{cases} y^2 = 2z, \\ x = 0 \end{cases}{y2=2z,x=0​ 绕 zzz 轴旋转一周而成的旋转面方程是 x2+y2=2zx^2 + y^2 = 2zx2+y2=2z. 于是, Ω\OmegaΩ 是由旋转抛物面 z=12(x2+y2)z = \dfrac{1}{2}(x^2 + y^2)z=21​(x2+y2) 与平面 z=4z = 4z=4 所围成. 曲面与平面的交线是 x2+y2=8,z=4x^2 + y^2 = 8, z = 4x2+y2=8,z=4. 选用柱坐标变换, 令 x=rcos⁡θ,y=rsin⁡θ,z=zx = r \cos \theta, y = r \sin \theta, z = zx=rcosθ,y=rsinθ,z=z, 于是 Ω:0⩽θ⩽2π,0⩽z⩽4,0⩽r⩽2z\Omega : 0 \leqslant \theta \leqslant 2\pi, 0 \leqslant z \leqslant 4, 0 \leqslant r \leqslant \sqrt{2z}Ω:0⩽θ⩽2π,0⩽z⩽4,0⩽r⩽2z​, 因此 I=∭Ω(x2+y2+z)dV=∫04dz∫02πdθ∫02z(r2+z)rdr=2π∫04[(r44+r2z2)∣r=0r=2z]dz=4π∫04z2dz=2563πI = \iiint\limits_{\Omega} (x^2 + y^2 + z) \mathrm{d}V = \int_{0}^{4} \mathrm{d}z \int_{0}^{2\pi} \mathrm{d}\theta \int_{0}^{\sqrt{2z}} (r^2 + z) r \mathrm{d}r = 2\pi \int_{0}^{4} \left[ \left( \dfrac{r^4}{4} + \dfrac{r^2 z}{2} \right) \Big|_{r=0}^{r=\sqrt{2z}} \right] \mathrm{d}z = 4\pi \int_{0}^{4} z^2 \mathrm{d}z = \dfrac{256}{3} \piI=Ω∭​(x2+y2+z)dV=∫04​dz∫02π​dθ∫02z​​(r2+z)rdr=2π∫04​[(4r4​+2r2z​)​r=0r=2z​​]dz=4π∫04​z2dz=3256​π.

(2015 数一) 设 Ω\OmegaΩ 是由 x+y+z=1x + y + z = 1x+y+z=1 与三个坐标平面所围成的空间区域, 则 ∭Ω(x+2y+3z)dxdydz=.\iiint\limits_{\Omega} (x + 2y + 3z) \mathrm{d}x\mathrm{d}y\mathrm{d}z = .Ω∭​(x+2y+3z)dxdydz=.

答案由轮换对称性, ∭Ω(x+2y+3z)dxdydz=6∭Ωzdxdydz=6∫01zdz∬Dzdxdy\iiint\limits_{\Omega} (x + 2y + 3z) \mathrm{d}x \mathrm{d}y \mathrm{d}z = 6 \iiint\limits_{\Omega} z \mathrm{d}x \mathrm{d}y \mathrm{d}z = 6 \int_{0}^{1} z \mathrm{d}z \iint\limits_{D_z} \mathrm{d}x \mathrm{d}yΩ∭​(x+2y+3z)dxdydz=6Ω∭​zdxdydz=6∫01​zdzDz​∬​dxdy, 其中 DzD_zDz​ 所得的截面其面积为 12(1−z)2\dfrac{1}{2}(1 - z)^221​(1−z)2. ∭Ω(x+2y+3z)dxdydz=6∭Ωzdxdydz=6∫01z12(1−z)2dz=3∫01(z3−2z2+z)dz=14\iiint\limits_{\Omega} (x + 2y + 3z) \mathrm{d}x \mathrm{d}y \mathrm{d}z = 6 \iiint\limits_{\Omega} z \mathrm{d}x \mathrm{d}y \mathrm{d}z = 6 \int_{0}^{1} z \dfrac{1}{2}(1 - z)^2 \mathrm{d}z = 3 \int_{0}^{1} (z^3 - 2z^2 + z) \mathrm{d}z = \dfrac{1}{4}Ω∭​(x+2y+3z)dxdydz=6Ω∭​zdxdydz=6∫01​z21​(1−z)2dz=3∫01​(z3−2z2+z)dz=41​

第二类曲线积分

(1988 数一) 设位于点 (0,1)(0, 1)(0,1) 的质点 AAA 对质点 MMM 的引力大小为 kr2\dfrac{k}{r^2}r2k​ (k>0k > 0k>0, 为常数, rrr 为 AAA 质点与 MMM 之间的距离), 质点 MMM 沿曲线 y=2x−x2y = \sqrt{2x - x^2}y=2x−x2​ 自 B(2,0)B(2, 0)B(2,0) 运动到 O(0,0)O(0, 0)O(0,0). 求在此运动过程中质点 AAA 对质点 MMM 的引力所做的功.

答案设 MMM 点坐标为 (x,y)(x, y)(x,y), 则 MA⃗={−x,1−y}\vec{MA} = \{-x, 1 - y\}MA={−x,1−y}, 且 r=x2+(1−y)2r = \sqrt{x^2 + (1 - y)^2}r=x2+(1−y)2​ 易得, 引力 f⃗\vec{f}f​ 的方向与 MA⃗={−x,1−y}\vec{MA} = \{-x, 1 - y\}MA={−x,1−y} 一致, 故 f⃗=kr3{−x,1−y}\vec{f} = \dfrac{k}{r^3} \{-x, 1 - y\}f​=r3k​{−x,1−y}. (由引力大小为 kr2\dfrac{k}{r^2}r2k​ 得到) 令 LLL 为质点 MMM 沿曲线 y=2x−x2y = \sqrt{2x - x^2}y=2x−x2​ 自 B(2,0)B(2, 0)B(2,0) 运动到 O(0,0)O(0, 0)O(0,0), 则 W=∫Lkr3[−xdx+(1−y)dy]=k∫L−x[x2+(1−y)2]32dx+1−y[x2+(1−y)2]32dyW = \int_L \dfrac{k}{r^3} [-x \mathrm{d}x + (1 - y) \mathrm{d}y] = k \int_{L} \dfrac{-x}{\left[x^2 + (1-y)^2\right]^{\dfrac{3}{2}}} \mathrm{d}x + \dfrac{1-y}{\left[x^2 + (1-y)^2\right]^{\dfrac{3}{2}}} \mathrm{d}yW=∫L​r3k​[−xdx+(1−y)dy]=k∫L​[x2+(1−y)2]23​−x​dx+[x2+(1−y)2]23​1−y​dy 由 LLL 的表达式为 y=2x−x2y = \sqrt{2x - x^2}y=2x−x2​ 的参数方程为 {x=1+cos⁡θ,y=sin⁡θ\begin{cases} x = 1 + \cos \theta, \\ y = \sin \theta \end{cases}{x=1+cosθ,y=sinθ​, 且 θ:0→π\theta : 0 \to \piθ:0→π 所以代入得 W=k∫0πsin⁡θ+cos⁡θ[3+2(cos⁡θ−sin⁡θ)]32dθ=−k2∫0πd[3+2(cos⁡θ−sin⁡θ)][3+2(cos⁡θ−sin⁡θ)]32=−k2⋅(−2)⋅[3+2(cos⁡θ−sin⁡θ)]−12∣0π=k(1−15)W = k \int_{0}^{\pi} \dfrac{\sin \theta + \cos \theta}{\left[3 + 2(\cos \theta - \sin \theta)\right]^{\dfrac{3}{2}}} \mathrm{d}\theta = \dfrac{-k}{2} \int_{0}^{\pi} \dfrac{\mathrm{d}[3 + 2(\cos \theta - \sin \theta)]}{\left[3 + 2(\cos \theta - \sin \theta)\right]^{\dfrac{3}{2}}} = \dfrac{-k}{2} \cdot (-2) \cdot [3 + 2(\cos \theta - \sin \theta)]^{-\dfrac{1}{2}} \Big|_{0}^{\pi} = k(1 - \dfrac{1}{\sqrt{5}})W=k∫0π​[3+2(cosθ−sinθ)]23​sinθ+cosθ​dθ=2−k​∫0π​[3+2(cosθ−sinθ)]23​d[3+2(cosθ−sinθ)]​=2−k​⋅(−2)⋅[3+2(cosθ−sinθ)]−21​​0π​=k(1−5​1​)

(1992 数一) 在变力 F=yzi+zxj+xyk\boldsymbol{F} = yz\boldsymbol{i} + zx\boldsymbol{j} + xy\boldsymbol{k}F=yzi+zxj+xyk 的作用下, 质点由原点沿直线运动到椭球面 x2a2+y2b2+z2c2=1\dfrac{x^2}{a^2} + \dfrac{y^2}{b^2} + \dfrac{z^2}{c^2} = 1a2x2​+b2y2​+c2z2​=1 上第一卦限的点 M(ξ,η,ζ)M(\xi, \eta, \zeta)M(ξ,η,ζ). 问: 当 ξ,η,ζ\xi, \eta, \zetaξ,η,ζ 取何值时, 力 F\boldsymbol{F}F 所做的功 WWW 最大? 并求出 WWW 的最大值.

答案(1) 先求出在变力 FFF 的作用下质点由原点沿直线运动到点 M(ξ,η,ζ)M(\xi, \eta, \zeta)M(ξ,η,ζ) 时所作的功 WWW 的表达式. 点 OOO 到点 MMM 的线段记为 LLL, 则 W=∫LF⋅ds=∫Lyzdx+zxdy+xydzW = \int_{L} F \cdot \mathrm{d}s = \int_{L} yz \mathrm{d}x + zx \mathrm{d}y + xy \mathrm{d}zW=∫L​F⋅ds=∫L​yzdx+zxdy+xydz. (2) 计算曲线积分: LLL 的参数方程是 x=ξt,y=ηt,z=ζt,tx = \xi t, y = \eta t, z = \zeta t, tx=ξt,y=ηt,z=ζt,t 从 0 到 1, ⇒W=∫01(ηζt2⋅ξ+ξζt2⋅η+ξηt2⋅ζ)dt=3ξηζ∫01t2dt=ξηζ\Rightarrow W = \int_{0}^{1} (\eta\zeta t^2 \cdot \xi + \xi\zeta t^2 \cdot \eta + \xi\eta t^2 \cdot \zeta) \mathrm{d}t = 3\xi\eta\zeta \int_{0}^{1} t^2 \mathrm{d}t = \xi\eta\zeta⇒W=∫01​(ηζt2⋅ξ+ξζt2⋅η+ξηt2⋅ζ)dt=3ξηζ∫01​t2dt=ξηζ. 化为最值问题并求解: 问题变成求 W=ξηζW = \xi\eta\zetaW=ξηζ 在条件 ξ2a2+η2b2+ζ2c2=1(ξ⩾0,η⩾0,ζ⩾0)\dfrac{\xi^2}{a^2} + \dfrac{\eta^2}{b^2} + \dfrac{\zeta^2}{c^2} = 1 (\xi \geqslant 0, \eta \geqslant 0, \zeta \geqslant 0)a2ξ2​+b2η2​+c2ζ2​=1(ξ⩾0,η⩾0,ζ⩾0) 下的最大值与最大值点. 用拉格朗日乘子法求解. 拉格朗日函数为 F(ξ,η,ζ,λ)=ξηζ+λ(ξ2a2+η2b2+ζ2c2−1)F(\xi, \eta, \zeta, \lambda) = \xi\eta\zeta + \lambda \left( \dfrac{\xi^2}{a^2} + \dfrac{\eta^2}{b^2} + \dfrac{\zeta^2}{c^2} - 1 \right)F(ξ,η,ζ,λ)=ξηζ+λ(a2ξ2​+b2η2​+c2ζ2​−1), 则有 {∂F∂ξ=ηζ+2λξa2=0,∂F∂η=ξζ+2ληb2=0,∂F∂γ=ξη+2λζc2=0,∂F∂λ=ξ2a2+η2b2+ζ2c2−1=0.\begin{cases} \dfrac{\partial F}{\partial \xi} = \eta\zeta + 2\lambda \dfrac{\xi}{a^2} = 0, \\ \dfrac{\partial F}{\partial \eta} = \xi\zeta + 2\lambda \dfrac{\eta}{b^2} = 0, \\ \dfrac{\partial F}{\partial \gamma} = \xi\eta + 2\lambda \dfrac{\zeta}{c^2} = 0, \\ \dfrac{\partial F}{\partial \lambda} = \dfrac{\xi^2}{a^2} + \dfrac{\eta^2}{b^2} + \dfrac{\zeta^2}{c^2} - 1 = 0. \end{cases}⎩⎨⎧​∂ξ∂F​=ηζ+2λa2ξ​=0,∂η∂F​=ξζ+2λb2η​=0,∂γ∂F​=ξη+2λc2ζ​=0,∂λ∂F​=a2ξ2​+b2η2​+c2ζ2​−1=0.​ 解此方程组: 对前三个方程, 分别乘以 ξ,η,ζ\xi, \eta, \zetaξ,η,ζ 得 ξ2a2=η2b2=ζ2c2,(λ≠0\dfrac{\xi^2}{a^2} = \dfrac{\eta^2}{b^2} = \dfrac{\zeta^2}{c^2}, (\lambda \neq 0a2ξ2​=b2η2​=c2ζ2​,(λ=0 时) 代入第四个方程得 ξ=13a,η=13b,ζ=13c\xi = \dfrac{1}{\sqrt{3}}a, \eta = \dfrac{1}{\sqrt{3}}b, \zeta = \dfrac{1}{\sqrt{3}}cξ=3​1​a,η=3​1​b,ζ=3​1​c. 相应的 W=133abc=39abcW = \dfrac{1}{3\sqrt{3}}abc = \dfrac{\sqrt{3}}{9}abcW=33​1​abc=93​​abc. 当 λ=0\lambda = 0λ=0 时相应的 ξ,η,ζ\xi, \eta, \zetaξ,η,ζ 得 W=0W = 0W=0. 因为实际问题存在最大值, 所以当 (ξ,η,γ)=(13a,13b,13c)(\xi, \eta, \gamma) = \left( \dfrac{1}{\sqrt{3}}a, \dfrac{1}{\sqrt{3}}b, \dfrac{1}{\sqrt{3}}c \right)(ξ,η,γ)=(3​1​a,3​1​b,3​1​c) 时 WWW 取最大值 39abc\dfrac{\sqrt{3}}{9} abc93​​abc.

(1995 数一) 设函数 Q(x,y)Q(x, y)Q(x,y) 在 xOyxOyxOy 平面上具有一阶连续偏导数, 曲线积分 ∫L2xydx+Q(x,y)dy\int_L 2xy \mathrm{d}x + Q(x, y) \mathrm{d}y∫L​2xydx+Q(x,y)dy 与路径无关, 并且对任意 ttt 恒有 ∫(0,0)(t,1)2xydx+Q(x,y)dy=∫(0,0)(1,t)2xydx+Q(x,y)dy\int_{(0, 0)}^{(t, 1)} 2xy \mathrm{d}x + Q(x, y) \mathrm{d}y = \int_{(0, 0)}^{(1, t)} 2xy \mathrm{d}x + Q(x, y) \mathrm{d}y∫(0,0)(t,1)​2xydx+Q(x,y)dy=∫(0,0)(1,t)​2xydx+Q(x,y)dy, 求 Q(x,y)Q(x, y)Q(x,y).

答案在平面上 ∫LPdx+Qdy\int_L P \mathrm{d}x + Q \mathrm{d}y∫L​Pdx+Qdy 与路径无关 (其中 P,QP, QP,Q 有连续偏导数), 充要条件为 ∂P∂y=∂Q∂x\dfrac{\partial P}{\partial y} = \dfrac{\partial Q}{\partial x}∂y∂P​=∂x∂Q​, 即 ∂Q∂x=2x\dfrac{\partial Q}{\partial x} = 2x∂x∂Q​=2x. 对 xxx 积分得 Q(x,y)=x2+φ(y)Q(x, y) = x^2 + \varphi(y)Q(x,y)=x2+φ(y), 其中 φ(y)\varphi(y)φ(y) 待定. 代入另一等式得对 ∀t\forall t∀t, ∫(0,0)(t,1)2xydx+(x2+φ(y))dy=∫(0,0)(1,t)2xydx+(x2+φ(y))dy\int_{(0, 0)}^{(t, 1)} 2xy \mathrm{d}x + \left( x^2 + \varphi(y) \right) \mathrm{d}y = \int_{(0, 0)}^{(1, t)} 2xy \mathrm{d}x + \left( x^2 + \varphi(y) \right) \mathrm{d}y∫(0,0)(t,1)​2xydx+(x2+φ(y))dy=∫(0,0)(1,t)​2xydx+(x2+φ(y))dy (1). 下面由此等式求 φ(y)\varphi(y)φ(y). 方法一: 易求得原函数 2xydx+(x2+φ(y))dy=ydx2+x2dy+φ(y)dy=d(x2y)+d(∫0yφ(s)ds)=d(x2y+∫0yφ(s)ds)2xy \mathrm{d}x + \left( x^2 + \varphi(y) \right) \mathrm{d}y = y \mathrm{d}x^2 + x^2 \mathrm{d}y + \varphi(y) \mathrm{d}y = \mathrm{d}(x^2 y) + \mathrm{d} \left( \int_0^y \varphi(s) \mathrm{d}s \right) = \mathrm{d} \left( x^2 y + \int_0^y \varphi(s) \mathrm{d}s \right)2xydx+(x2+φ(y))dy=ydx2+x2dy+φ(y)dy=d(x2y)+d(∫0y​φ(s)ds)=d(x2y+∫0y​φ(s)ds). 于是由 (1) 式得 (x2y+∫0yφ(s)ds)∣(0,0)(t,1)=(x2y+∫0yφ(s)ds)∣(0,0)(1,t)\left. \left( x^2 y + \int_0^y \varphi(s) \mathrm{d}s \right) \right|_{(0, 0)}^{(t, 1)} = \left. \left( x^2 y + \int_0^y \varphi(s) \mathrm{d}s \right) \right|_{(0, 0)}^{(1, t)}(x2y+∫0y​φ(s)ds)​(0,0)(t,1)​=(x2y+∫0y​φ(s)ds)​(0,0)(1,t)​. 即 t2+∫01φ(s)ds=t+∫0tφ(s)dst^2 + \int_0^1 \varphi(s) \mathrm{d}s = t + \int_0^t \varphi(s) \mathrm{d}st2+∫01​φ(s)ds=t+∫0t​φ(s)ds, 亦即 t2=t+∫1tφ(s)dst^2 = t + \int_1^t \varphi(s) \mathrm{d}st2=t+∫1t​φ(s)ds. 求导得 2t=1+φ(t)2t = 1 + \varphi(t)2t=1+φ(t), 即 φ(t)=2t−1\varphi(t) = 2t - 1φ(t)=2t−1. 因此 Q(x,y)=x2+2y−1Q(x, y) = x^2 + 2y - 1Q(x,y)=x2+2y−1. 方法二: 取特殊的积分路径: 对 (1) 式左端积分取积分路径 (0,0)→(t,0)→(t,1)(0,0) \to (t,0) \to (t,1)(0,0)→(t,0)→(t,1) 和右端积分取积分路径 (0,0)→(1,0)→(1,t)(0,0) \to (1,0) \to (1,t)(0,0)→(1,0)→(1,t), 于是得 ∫01(t2+φ(y))dy=∫0t(1+φ(y))dy\int_{0}^{1} \left( t^2 + \varphi(y) \right) \mathrm{d}y = \int_{0}^{t} \left( 1 + \varphi(y) \right) \mathrm{d}y∫01​(t2+φ(y))dy=∫0t​(1+φ(y))dy. 即 t2+∫01φ(y)dy=t+∫0tφ(y)dyt^2 + \int_{0}^{1} \varphi(y) \mathrm{d}y = t + \int_{0}^{t} \varphi(y) \mathrm{d}yt2+∫01​φ(y)dy=t+∫0t​φ(y)dy, 亦即 t2=t+∫1tφ(y)dyt^2 = t + \int_{1}^{t} \varphi(y) \mathrm{d}yt2=t+∫1t​φ(y)dy. 其余与方法一相同.

(1998 数一) 确定常数 λ\lambdaλ, 使在右半平面 x>0x > 0x>0 上的向量 A(x,y)=2xy(x4+y2)λi−x2(x4+y2)λj\boldsymbol{A}(x, y) = 2xy(x^4 + y^2)^\lambda \boldsymbol{i} - x^2(x^4 + y^2)^\lambda \boldsymbol{j}A(x,y)=2xy(x4+y2)λi−x2(x4+y2)λj 为某二元函数 u(x,y)u(x, y)u(x,y) 的梯度, 并求 u(x,y)u(x, y)u(x,y).

答案令 P(x,y)=2xy(x4+y2)λ,Q(x,y)=−x2(x4+y2)λP(x, y) = 2xy(x^4 + y^2)^\lambda, Q(x, y) = -x^2(x^4 + y^2)^\lambdaP(x,y)=2xy(x4+y2)λ,Q(x,y)=−x2(x4+y2)λ, 则 A(x,y)=(P(x,y),Q(x,y))\boldsymbol{A}(x, y) = (P(x, y), Q(x, y))A(x,y)=(P(x,y),Q(x,y)) 在单联通区域右半平面 x>0x > 0x>0 上为某二元函数 u(x,y)u(x, y)u(x,y) 的梯度. ∃\exists∃ 原函数 u(x,y)⇔∂Q∂x=∂P∂y,x>0u(x, y) \Leftrightarrow \dfrac{\partial Q}{\partial x} = \dfrac{\partial P}{\partial y}, x > 0u(x,y)⇔∂x∂Q​=∂y∂P​,x>0. 其中, ∂Q∂x=−2x(x4+y2)λ−λx2(x4+y2)λ−1⋅4x3\dfrac{\partial Q}{\partial x} = -2x(x^4 + y^2)^\lambda - \lambda x^2(x^4 + y^2)^{\lambda-1} \cdot 4x^3∂x∂Q​=−2x(x4+y2)λ−λx2(x4+y2)λ−1⋅4x3, ∂P∂y=2x(x4+y2)λ+2λxy(x4+y2)λ−1⋅2y\dfrac{\partial P}{\partial y} = 2x(x^4 + y^2)^\lambda + 2\lambda xy(x^4 + y^2)^{\lambda-1} \cdot 2y∂y∂P​=2x(x4+y2)λ+2λxy(x4+y2)λ−1⋅2y. 由 ∂Q∂x=∂P∂y\dfrac{\partial Q}{\partial x} = \dfrac{\partial P}{\partial y}∂x∂Q​=∂y∂P​, 即满足 −2x(x4+y2)λ−λx2(x4+y2)λ−1⋅4x3=2x(x4+y2)λ+2λxy(x4+y2)λ−1⋅2y,⇔4x(x4+y2)λ(λ+1)=0⇔λ=−1-2x(x^4 + y^2)^\lambda - \lambda x^2(x^4 + y^2)^{\lambda-1} \cdot 4x^3 = 2x(x^4 + y^2)^\lambda + 2\lambda xy(x^4 + y^2)^{\lambda-1} \cdot 2y, \Leftrightarrow 4x(x^4 + y^2)^\lambda (\lambda + 1) = 0 \Leftrightarrow \lambda = -1−2x(x4+y2)λ−λx2(x4+y2)λ−1⋅4x3=2x(x4+y2)λ+2λxy(x4+y2)λ−1⋅2y,⇔4x(x4+y2)λ(λ+1)=0⇔λ=−1. 可见, 当 λ=−1\lambda = -1λ=−1 时, 所给向量场为某二元函数的梯度场. 为求 u(x,y)u(x, y)u(x,y), 采用折线法, 在 x>0x > 0x>0 半平面内任取一点, 比如点 (1,0)(1, 0)(1,0) 作为积分路径的起点, 则根据积分与路径无关, 沿折线积分 L1:(1,0)→(x,0),L2:(x,0)→(x,y)L_1 : (1, 0) \to (x, 0), L_2 : (x, 0) \to (x, y)L1​:(1,0)→(x,0),L2​:(x,0)→(x,y), u(x,y)=∫(1,0)(x,y)2xydx−x2dyx4+y2+C=∫1x2x⋅0x4+0dx+∫0y−x2x4+y2dy+Cu(x, y) = \int_{(1, 0)}^{(x, y)} \dfrac{2xy \mathrm{d}x - x^2 \mathrm{d}y}{x^4 + y^2} + C = \int_{1}^{x} \dfrac{2x \cdot 0}{x^4 + 0} \mathrm{d}x + \int_{0}^{y} \dfrac{-x^2}{x^4 + y^2} \mathrm{d}y + Cu(x,y)=∫(1,0)(x,y)​x4+y22xydx−x2dy​+C=∫1x​x4+02x⋅0​dx+∫0y​x4+y2−x2​dy+C (折线法) =∫0y−x2x4+y2dy+C=∫0y−x2x4(1+(yx2)2)dy+C=−∫0y11+(yx2)2d(yx2)+C=−arctan⁡yx2+C= \int_{0}^{y} \dfrac{-x^2}{x^4 + y^2} \mathrm{d}y + C = \int_{0}^{y} \dfrac{-x^2}{x^4 \left( 1 + \left( \dfrac{y}{x^2} \right)^2 \right)} \mathrm{d}y + C = -\int_{0}^{y} \dfrac{1}{1 + \left( \dfrac{y}{x^2} \right)^2} \mathrm{d} \left( \dfrac{y}{x^2} \right) + C = -\arctan \dfrac{y}{x^2} + C=∫0y​x4+y2−x2​dy+C=∫0y​x4(1+(x2y​)2)−x2​dy+C=−∫0y​1+(x2y​)21​d(x2y​)+C=−arctanx2y​+C, 其中 CCC 为任意常数

(2000 数一) 计算曲线积分 I=∮Lxdy−ydx4x2+y2I = \oint_L \dfrac{x \mathrm{d}y - y \mathrm{d}x}{4x^2 + y^2}I=∮L​4x2+y2xdy−ydx​, 其中 LLL 是以点 (1,0)(1, 0)(1,0) 为中心, RRR 为半径的圆周 (R>1)(R > 1)(R>1), 取逆时针方向.

答案记 P=−y4x2+y2P = \displaystyle \dfrac{-y}{4x^2 + y^2}P=4x2+y2−y​, Q=x4x2+y2Q = \displaystyle \dfrac{x}{4x^2 + y^2}Q=4x2+y2x​, 则 ∂P∂y−∂Q∂x=0\displaystyle \dfrac{\partial P}{\partial y} - \dfrac{\partial Q}{\partial x} = 0∂y∂P​−∂x∂Q​=0, (x,y)≠(0,0)(x, y) \neq (0, 0)(x,y)=(0,0). 在 LLL 内加 L1L_1L1​: 椭圆 4x2+y2=ε24x^2 + y^2 = \varepsilon^24x2+y2=ε2 的顺时针方向, 则 I=∫L+L1xdy−ydx4x2+y2−∫L1xdy−ydx4x2+y2=∬D0dxdy−∫L1xdy−ydx4x2+y2I = \int_{L + L_1} \dfrac{xdy - ydx}{4x^2 + y^2} - \int_{L_1} \dfrac{xdy - ydx}{4x^2 + y^2} = \iint\limits_{D} 0dxdy - \int_{L_1} \dfrac{xdy - ydx}{4x^2 + y^2}I=∫L+L1​​4x2+y2xdy−ydx​−∫L1​​4x2+y2xdy−ydx​=D∬​0dxdy−∫L1​​4x2+y2xdy−ydx​ (DDD 由 LLL 与 L1L_1L1​ 所围) =−1ε2∫L1xdy−ydx=1ε2∬D12dxdy= -\dfrac{1}{\varepsilon^2} \int_{L_1} xdy - ydx = \dfrac{1}{\varepsilon^2} \iint\limits_{D_1} 2dxdy=−ε21​∫L1​​xdy−ydx=ε21​D1​∬​2dxdy (D1:4x2+y2≤ε2D_1 : 4x^2 + y^2 \le \varepsilon^2D1​:4x2+y2≤ε2) =2ε2⋅π⋅ε2⋅ε=π= \dfrac{2}{\varepsilon^2} \cdot \pi \cdot \dfrac{\varepsilon}{2} \cdot \varepsilon = \pi=ε22​⋅π⋅2ε​⋅ε=π. 若 L1L_1L1​ 取 x2+y2=ε2x^2+y^2=\varepsilon^2x2+y2=ε2, 则最后计算定积分需注意积分区间存在第二类间断点, 需要拆分区间再计算定积分.

(2005 数一) 设函数 φ(y)\varphi(y)φ(y) 具有连续导数, 在围绕原点的任意分段光滑简单闭曲线 LLL 上, 曲线积分 ∮Lφ(y)dx+2xydy2x2+y4\oint\limits_{L} \displaystyle \dfrac{\varphi(y)dx + 2xydy}{2x^2 + y^4}L∮​2x2+y4φ(y)dx+2xydy​ 的值恒为同一常数.
(1)证明: 对右半平面 x>0x > 0x>0 内的任意分段光滑简单闭曲线 CCC, 有 ∮Cφ(y)dx+2xydy2x2+y4=0\oint\limits_{C} \displaystyle \dfrac{\varphi(y)dx + 2xydy}{2x^2 + y^4} = 0C∮​2x2+y4φ(y)dx+2xydy​=0;
(2)求函数 φ(y)\varphi(y)φ(y) 的表达式.

答案(1) 将 CCC 分解为 l1l_1l1​ 和 l2l_2l2​, l1l_1l1​ 方向为逆时针, l2l_2l2​方向为顺时针, 另作一条曲线 l3l_3l3​ 围绕原点且与 CCC 相接, 方向为逆时针, 则 ∫cϕ(y)dx+2xydy2x2+y4=∮l1+l3ϕ(y)dx+2xydy2x2+y4−∫l2+l3ϕ(y)dx+2xydy2x2+y4=0.\int_{c} \displaystyle \dfrac{\phi(y)dx + 2xydy}{2x^2 + y^4} = \oint\limits_{l_1 + l_3} \displaystyle \dfrac{\phi(y)dx + 2xydy}{2x^2 + y^4} - \int_{l_2 + l_3} \displaystyle \dfrac{\phi(y)dx + 2xydy}{2x^2 + y^4} = 0.∫c​2x2+y4ϕ(y)dx+2xydy​=l1​+l3​∮​2x2+y4ϕ(y)dx+2xydy​−∫l2​+l3​​2x2+y4ϕ(y)dx+2xydy​=0. (2) 设 P=φ(y)2x2+y4P = \displaystyle \dfrac{\varphi(y)}{2x^2 + y^4}P=2x2+y4φ(y)​, Q=2xy2x2+y4Q = \displaystyle \dfrac{2xy}{2x^2 + y^4}Q=2x2+y42xy​, P,QP, QP,Q 在单连通区域 x>0x > 0x>0 内具有一阶连续偏导数, 由 (1) 知, 曲线积分 ∫Lφ(y)dx+2xydy2x2+y4\displaystyle \int_{L} \dfrac{\varphi(y)dx + 2xydy}{2x^2 + y^4}∫L​2x2+y4φ(y)dx+2xydy​ 在该区域内与路径无关, 故当 x>0x > 0x>0 时, 总有 ∂Q∂x=∂P∂y\displaystyle \dfrac{\partial Q}{\partial x} = \dfrac{\partial P}{\partial y}∂x∂Q​=∂y∂P​. 经计算, ∂Q∂x=2y(2x2+y4)−4x⋅2xy(2x2+y4)2=−4x2y+2y5(2x2+y4)2\displaystyle \dfrac{\partial Q}{\partial x} = \dfrac{2y(2x^2 + y^4) - 4x \cdot 2xy}{(2x^2 + y^4)^2} = \dfrac{-4x^2y + 2y^5}{(2x^2 + y^4)^2}∂x∂Q​=(2x2+y4)22y(2x2+y4)−4x⋅2xy​=(2x2+y4)2−4x2y+2y5​, ∂P∂y=φ′(y)(2x2+y4)−4φ(y)y3(2x2+y4)2=2x2φ′(y)+φ′(y)y4−4φ(y)y3(2x2+y4)2\displaystyle \dfrac{\partial P}{\partial y} = \dfrac{\varphi'(y)(2x^2 + y^4) - 4\varphi(y)y^3}{(2x^2 + y^4)^2} = \dfrac{2x^2\varphi'(y) + \varphi'(y)y^4 - 4\varphi(y)y^3}{(2x^2 + y^4)^2}∂y∂P​=(2x2+y4)2φ′(y)(2x2+y4)−4φ(y)y3​=(2x2+y4)22x2φ′(y)+φ′(y)y4−4φ(y)y3​. 比较两式的右端, 得 {φ′(y)=−2yφ′(y)y4−4φ(y)y3=2y5\begin{cases} \varphi'(y) = -2y & \\ \varphi'(y)y^4 - 4\varphi(y)y^3 = 2y^5 & \end{cases}{φ′(y)=−2yφ′(y)y4−4φ(y)y3=2y5​​, 进而 φ(y)=−y2+c\varphi(y) = -y^2 + cφ(y)=−y2+c, 2y5−4cy3=2y52y^5 - 4cy^3 = 2y^52y5−4cy3=2y5, 所以 c=0c = 0c=0, 从而 φ(y)=−y2\varphi(y) = -y^2φ(y)=−y2.

(2006 数一) 设在上半平面 D={(x,y)∣y>0}D = \{(x, y) | y > 0\}D={(x,y)∣y>0} 内, 函数 f(x,y)f(x, y)f(x,y) 是有连续偏导数的, 且对任意的 t>0t > 0t>0 都有 f(tx,ty)=t−2f(x,y)f(tx, ty) = t^{-2}f(x, y)f(tx,ty)=t−2f(x,y). 证明: 对 DDD 内任意分段光滑的有向简单闭曲线 LLL, 都有 ∮Lyf(x,y)dx−xf(x,y)dy=0\oint_L yf(x, y)dx - xf(x, y)dy = 0∮L​yf(x,y)dx−xf(x,y)dy=0.

答案在 f(tx,ty)=t−2f(x,y)f(tx, ty) = t^{-2} f(x, y)f(tx,ty)=t−2f(x,y) 两边对 ttt 求导, 得: xf1′(tx,ty)+yf2′(tx,ty)=−2t−3f(x,y)xf'_1(tx, ty) + yf'_2(tx, ty) = -2t^{-3} f(x, y)xf1′​(tx,ty)+yf2′​(tx,ty)=−2t−3f(x,y) 令 t=1t = 1t=1, 则 xf1′(x,y)+yf2′(x,y)=−2f(x,y)xf'_1(x, y) + yf'_2(x, y) = -2f(x, y)xf1′​(x,y)+yf2′​(x,y)=−2f(x,y); 再令 P=yf(x,y)P = yf(x, y)P=yf(x,y), Q=−xf(x,y)Q = -xf(x, y)Q=−xf(x,y), 所以 ∂Q∂x=−f(x,y)−xf1′(x,y)\displaystyle \dfrac{\partial Q}{\partial x} = -f(x, y) - xf'_1(x, y)∂x∂Q​=−f(x,y)−xf1′​(x,y), ∂P∂y=f(x,y)+yf2′(x,y)\displaystyle \dfrac{\partial P}{\partial y} = f(x, y) + yf'_2(x, y)∂y∂P​=f(x,y)+yf2′​(x,y) 得 ∂Q∂x=∂P∂y\displaystyle \dfrac{\partial Q}{\partial x} = \dfrac{\partial P}{\partial y}∂x∂Q​=∂y∂P​, 所以由格林公式知结论成立.

(2013 数一) 设 l1:x2+y2=1,l2:x2+y2=2,l3:x2+2y2=2,l4:2x2+y2=2l_1 : x^2 + y^2 = 1, l_2 : x^2 + y^2 = 2, l_3 : x^2 + 2y^2 = 2, l_4 : 2x^2 + y^2 = 2l1​:x2+y2=1,l2​:x2+y2=2,l3​:x2+2y2=2,l4​:2x2+y2=2, 为四条逆时针的平面曲线, 记 Ii=∮li(y+y36)dx+(2x−x33)dy(i=1,2,3,4)I_i = \oint\limits_{l_i} (y + \displaystyle \dfrac{y^3}{6})dx + (2x - \displaystyle \dfrac{x^3}{3})dy (i = 1, 2, 3, 4)Ii​=li​∮​(y+6y3​)dx+(2x−3x3​)dy(i=1,2,3,4), 则 max⁡(Ii)=()\max(I_i) = (\quad)max(Ii​)=().
A. I1I_1I1​
B. I2I_2I2​
C. I3I_3I3​
D. I4I_4I4​

答案Ii=∫li(y+y36)dx+(2x−x33)dy(i=1,2,3,4)=∬Di(1−x2−y22)dxdyI_i = \int_{l_i} (y + \displaystyle \dfrac{y^3}{6})dx + (2x - \displaystyle \dfrac{x^3}{3})dy (i = 1, 2, 3, 4) = \iint\limits_{D_i} (1 - x^2 - \displaystyle \dfrac{y^2}{2})dxdyIi​=∫li​​(y+6y3​)dx+(2x−3x3​)dy(i=1,2,3,4)=Di​∬​(1−x2−2y2​)dxdy 利用二重积分的几何意义, 比较积分区域以及函数的正负, 在区域 D1,D4D_1, D_4D1​,D4​ 上函数为正值, 则区域大, 积分大, 所以 I4>I1I_4 > I_1I4​>I1​, 在 D4D_4D4​ 之外函数值为负, 因此 I4>I2,I4>I3I_4 > I_2, I_4 > I_3I4​>I2​,I4​>I3​, 故选 (D)

(2016 数一) 设函数 f(x,y)f(x, y)f(x,y) 满足 ∂f(x,y)∂x=(2x+1)e2x−y\displaystyle \dfrac{\partial f(x, y)}{\partial x} = (2x + 1)e^{2x - y}∂x∂f(x,y)​=(2x+1)e2x−y, 且 f(0,y)=y+1f(0, y) = y + 1f(0,y)=y+1, LtL_tLt​ 是从点 (0,0)(0, 0)(0,0) 到点 (1,t)(1, t)(1,t) 的光滑曲线, 计算曲线积分 I(t)=∫Lt∂f(x,y)∂xdx+∂f(x,y)∂ydyI(t) = \displaystyle \int_{L_t} \dfrac{\partial f(x, y)}{\partial x} dx + \dfrac{\partial f(x, y)}{\partial y} dyI(t)=∫Lt​​∂x∂f(x,y)​dx+∂y∂f(x,y)​dy, 并求 I(t)I(t)I(t) 的最小值.

答案 I(t)=t+e(2−t)I(t)=t+e^(2-t)I(t)=t+e(2−t), 最大值为3

第一类曲面积分

(1989 数一) 设半径为 RRR 的球面 Σ\SigmaΣ 的球心在定球面 x2+y2+z2=a2(a>0)x^2 + y^2 + z^2 = a^2 (a > 0)x2+y2+z2=a2(a>0) 上, 问: 当 RRR 为何值时, 球面 Σ\SigmaΣ 在定球面内部的那部分的面积最大?

答案 R=4a3R=\dfrac{4a}{3}R=34a​. 注意投影区域为 x2+y2≤R2−R44a2x^2+y^2 \le R^2-\dfrac{R^4}{4a^2}x2+y2≤R2−4a2R4​

(1995 数一) 计算曲面积分 ∬ΣzdS\iint\limits_{\Sigma} zdSΣ∬​zdS, 其中 Σ\SigmaΣ 为锥面 z=x2+y2z = \sqrt{x^2 + y^2}z=x2+y2​ 在柱体 x2+y2≤2xx^2 + y^2 \le 2xx2+y2≤2x 内的部分.

答案3229\dfrac{32\sqrt{2}}{9}9322​​

(2010 数一) 设 PPP 为椭球面 S:x2+y2+z2−yz=1S: x^{2}+y^{2}+z^{2}-yz=1S:x2+y2+z2−yz=1 上的动点, 若 SSS 在点 PPP 处的切平面与 xOyxOyxOy 面垂直, 求点 PPP 的轨迹 CCC, 并计算曲面积分 I=∬Σ(x+3)∣y−2z∣4+y2+z2−4yzdSI = \iint\limits_{\Sigma} \dfrac{(x+\sqrt{3})|y-2z|}{\sqrt{4+y^{2}+z^{2}-4yz}} \text{d}SI=Σ∬​4+y2+z2−4yz​(x+3​)∣y−2z∣​dS, 其中 Σ\SigmaΣ 是椭球面 SSS 位于曲线 CCC 上方的部分.
