答案(1) 令 F(x,y,z)=x2+y2+z2−yz−1F(x, y, z) = x^{2} + y^{2} + z^{2} - yz - 1F(x,y,z)=x2+y2+z2−yz−1, 故动点 P(x,y,z)P(x, y, z)P(x,y,z) 的切平面的法向量为 {2x,2y−z,2z−y}\{2x, 2y - z, 2z - y\}{2x,2y−z,2z−y}, 切平面与 xOyxOyxOy 面垂直, 即两者的法向量垂直, 则内积为零, 即得 2z−y=02z - y = 02z−y=0, 故动点 P(x,y,z)P(x, y, z)P(x,y,z) 的轨迹为 {x2+y2+z2−yz=12z−y=0\begin{cases} x^{2} + y^{2} + z^{2} - yz = 1 \\ 2z - y = 0 \end{cases}{x2+y2+z2−yz=12z−y=0​ (2) 由 {x2+y2+z2−yz=12z−y=0\begin{cases} x^{2}+y^{2}+z^{2}-yz=1 \\ 2z-y=0 \end{cases}{x2+y2+z2−yz=12z−y=0​ 消去 zzz, 可得曲线 CCC 在 xOyxOyxOy 平面上的投影曲线所围成的 xOyxOyxOy 上的区域 D:{(x,y)∣x2+34y2≤1}D:\left\{(x, y) \mid x^{2}+\dfrac{3}{4} y^{2} \le 1\right\}D:{(x,y)∣x2+43​y2≤1}, 再由 S:x2+y2+z2−yz=1S: x^{2}+y^{2}+z^{2}-yz=1S:x2+y2+z2−yz=1, 可得 ∂z∂x=−2x2z−y,∂z∂y=z−2y2z−y\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x}=\dfrac{-2x}{2z-y}, \dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y}=\dfrac{z-2y}{2z-y}∂x∂z​=2z−y−2x​,∂y∂z​=2z−yz−2y​ 故 dS=1+(∂z∂x)2+(∂z∂y)2dxdy=4+y2+z2−4yz∣y−2z∣dxdydS=\sqrt{1+\left(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial x}\right)^{2}+\left(\dfrac{\partial z}{\partial y}\right)^{2}} dxdy = \dfrac{\sqrt{4+y^{2}+z^{2}-4yz}}{|y-2z|} dxdydS=1+(∂x∂z​)2+(∂y∂z​)2​dxdy=∣y−2z∣4+y2+z2−4yz​​dxdy, 则 I=∬Σ(x+3)∣y−2z∣4+y2+z2−4yzdS=∬D(x+3)dxdy=∬Dxdxdy+∬D3dxdy=∬D3dxdy=3π⋅1⋅23=2π.I=\iint\limits_{\Sigma} \dfrac{(x+\sqrt{3})|y-2z|}{\sqrt{4+y^{2}+z^{2}-4yz}} dS = \iint\limits_{D} (x+\sqrt{3}) dxdy = \iint\limits_{D} x dxdy + \iint\limits_{D} \sqrt{3} dxdy = \iint\limits_{D} \sqrt{3} dxdy = \sqrt{3} \pi \cdot 1 \cdot \dfrac{2}{\sqrt{3}} = 2\pi.I=Σ∬​4+y2+z2−4yz​(x+3​)∣y−2z∣​dS=D∬​(x+3​)dxdy=D∬​xdxdy+D∬​3​dxdy=D∬​3​dxdy=3​π⋅1⋅3​2​=2π.

第二类曲面积分

(2000 数一) 设对于半空间 x>0x>0x>0 内任意的光滑有向封闭曲面 SSS, 都有 ∯Sxf(x)dydz−xyf(x)dzdx−e2xzdxdy=0.\oiint\limits_{S} x f(x) \text{d}y\text{d}z - x y f(x) \text{d}z\text{d}x - e^{2x} z \text{d}x\text{d}y = 0.S∬​​xf(x)dydz−xyf(x)dzdx−e2xzdxdy=0. 其中函数 f(x)f(x)f(x) 在 (0,+∞)(0, +\infty)(0,+∞) 内具有连续的一阶导数, 且 lim⁡x→0+f(x)=1\lim\limits_{x \to 0^{+}} f(x) = 1x→0+lim​f(x)=1, 求 f(x)f(x)f(x).

答案exx(ex−1)\dfrac{e^x}{x}(e^x-1)xex​(ex−1)

(2001 数一) 计算 I=∮L(y2−z2)dx+(2z2−x2)dy+(3x2−y2)dzI = \oint\limits_{L} (y^{2}-z^{2}) \text{d}x + (2z^{2}-x^{2}) \text{d}y + (3x^{2}-y^{2}) \text{d}zI=L∮​(y2−z2)dx+(2z2−x2)dy+(3x2−y2)dz, 其中 LLL 是平面 x+y+z=2x+y+z=2x+y+z=2 与柱面 ∣x∣+∣y∣=1|x|+|y|=1∣x∣+∣y∣=1 的交线, 从 zzz 轴正向看过去, LLL 为逆时针方向.

答案−24-24−24. 斯托克斯公式转化为第二类曲面积分, 带入 x+y+z=2x+y+z=2x+y+z=2 而不是 z=0z=0z=0

(2004 数一) 计算曲面积分 I=∬Σ2x3dydz+2y3dzdx+3(z2−1)dxdyI = \iint\limits_{\Sigma} 2x^{3} \text{d}y\text{d}z + 2y^{3} \text{d}z\text{d}x + 3(z^{2}-1) \text{d}x\text{d}yI=Σ∬​2x3dydz+2y3dzdx+3(z2−1)dxdy, 其中 Σ\SigmaΣ 是曲面 z=1−x2−y2(z≥0)z=1-x^{2}-y^{2} (z \ge 0)z=1−x2−y2(z≥0) 的上侧.

答案−π-\pi−π

(2007 数一) 计算曲面积分 I=∬Σxzdydz+2zydzdx+3xydxdyI = \iint\limits_{\Sigma} xz \text{d}y\text{d}z + 2zy \text{d}z\text{d}x + 3xy \text{d}x\text{d}yI=Σ∬​xzdydz+2zydzdx+3xydxdy, 其中 Σ\SigmaΣ 为曲面 z=1−x2−y24(0≤z≤1)z = 1 - x^{2} - \dfrac{y^{2}}{4} (0 \le z \le 1)z=1−x2−4y2​(0≤z≤1) 的上侧.

答案增加一个曲面使之成为闭合曲面, 从而利用高斯公式, 补充曲面片 S:z=0,x2+y24≤1S: z=0, x^{2}+\dfrac{y^{2}}{4} \le 1S:z=0,x2+4y2​≤1, 取下侧 I=∬Σ+Sxzdydz+2zydzdx+3xydxdy−∬Sxzdydz+2zydzdx+3xydxdy=I1+I2I = \iint\limits_{\Sigma+S} xzdydz + 2zydzdx + 3xydxdy - \iint\limits_{S} xzdydz + 2zydzdx + 3xydxdy = I_{1} + I_{2}I=Σ+S∬​xzdydz+2zydzdx+3xydxdy−S∬​xzdydz+2zydzdx+3xydxdy=I1​+I2​ 根据高斯公式, 其中, Ω={(x,y,z)∣x2+y24≤1−z,0≤z≤1}\Omega = \left\{(x, y, z) \mid x^{2}+\dfrac{y^{2}}{4} \le 1-z, 0 \le z \le 1\right\}Ω={(x,y,z)∣x2+4y2​≤1−z,0≤z≤1}. I1=∭Ω(z+2z)dv=∫013zdz∬x2+14y2≤1−zdxdy=∫016πz(1−z)dz=πI_{1} = \iiint\limits_{\Omega} (z+2z) dv = \int\limits_{0}^{1} 3z dz \iint\limits_{x^{2}+\dfrac{1}{4}y^{2} \le 1-z} dxdy = \int\limits_{0}^{1} 6\pi z(1-z) dz = \piI1​=Ω∭​(z+2z)dv=0∫1​3zdzx2+41​y2≤1−z∬​dxdy=0∫1​6πz(1−z)dz=π 又 I2=−∬x2+14y2≤13xydxdyI_{2} = -\iint\limits_{x^{2}+\dfrac{1}{4}y^{2} \le 1} 3xydxdyI2​=−x2+41​y2≤1∬​3xydxdy 由函数奇偶性可知 ∬x2+14y2≤13xydxdy=0\iint\limits_{x^{2}+\dfrac{1}{4}y^{2} \le 1} 3xydxdy = 0x2+41​y2≤1∬​3xydxdy=0, 从而 I=π+0=π.I = \pi + 0 = \pi.I=π+0=π.

(2015 数一) 已知曲线 LLL 的方程为 {z=2−x2−y2z=x\begin{cases} z = \sqrt{2-x^{2}-y^{2}} \\ z = x \end{cases}{z=2−x2−y2​z=x​, 起点为 A(0,2,0)A(0, \sqrt{2}, 0)A(0,2​,0), 终点为 B(0,−2,0)B(0, -\sqrt{2}, 0)B(0,−2​,0), 计算曲线积分 I=∫L(y+z)dx+(z2−x2+y)dy+(x2+y2)dz.I = \int\limits_{L} (y+z) \text{d}x + (z^{2}-x^{2}+y) \text{d}y + (x^{2}+y^{2}) \text{d}z.I=L∫​(y+z)dx+(z2−x2+y)dy+(x2+y2)dz.

答案本题考察的空间第二类曲线积分, 针对此类题目的解题思路一般有三: 一是斯托克斯公式(即三维), 二是降到二维, 即投影到 xOyxOyxOy 面上, 三是降到一维, 即利用参数方程处理. 当然对不同的题目, 这三种方法各有利弊, 因为有些图像(特别是三维图像)很难画出, 只能想象, 这就增加了难度. 所以本题通行的解法为参数方程, 基本没有利用前两种方法, 在此作者试着把这三种方法都解释一下, 以飨读者. 方法一: 斯托克斯公式 易知曲线 LLL 不是闭合的, 所以先补线, 使得是闭合的, 因为斯托克斯所讨论的曲线是闭合的, 这样才会围成一个曲面. 故补线 L1L_{1}L1​: yyy 轴上从 B(0,−2,0)B(0, -\sqrt{2}, 0)B(0,−2​,0) 至 A(0,2,0)A(0, \sqrt{2}, 0)A(0,2​,0) I=∫L(y+z)dx+(z2−x2+y)dy+(x2+y2)dz=∫L+L1(y+z)dx+(z2−x2+y)dy+(x2+y2)dz−∫L1(y+z)dx+(z2−x2+y)dy+(x2+y2)dzI = \int\limits_{L} (y+z)dx + (z^{2}-x^{2}+y)dy + (x^{2}+y^{2})dz = \int\limits_{L+L_{1}} (y+z)dx + (z^{2}-x^{2}+y)dy + (x^{2}+y^{2})dz - \int\limits_{L_{1}} (y+z)dx + (z^{2}-x^{2}+y)dy + (x^{2}+y^{2})dzI=L∫​(y+z)dx+(z2−x2+y)dy+(x2+y2)dz=L+L1​∫​(y+z)dx+(z2−x2+y)dy+(x2+y2)dz−L1​∫​(y+z)dx+(z2−x2+y)dy+(x2+y2)dz 其中 L1:x=z=0,−2<y<2L_{1}: x=z=0, -\sqrt{2} < y < \sqrt{2}L1​:x=z=0,−2​<y<2​, 因此 ∫L1(y+z)dx+(z2−x2+y)dy+(x2+y2)dz=∫−22ydy=0\int\limits_{L_{1}} (y+z)dx + (z^{2}-x^{2}+y)dy + (x^{2}+y^{2})dz = \int\limits_{-\sqrt{2}}^{\sqrt{2}} y dy = 0L1​∫​(y+z)dx+(z2−x2+y)dy+(x2+y2)dz=−2​∫2​​ydy=0 则 I=∫L(y+z)dx+(z2−x2+y)dy+(x2+y2)dz=∫L+L1(y+z)dx+(z2−x2+y)dy+(x2+y2)dz=∬Σ∣dydzdzdxdxdy∂∂x∂∂y∂∂zy+zz2−x2+yx2+y2∣=∬Σ(2y−2z)dydz+(1−2x)dzdx+(−1−2x)dxdyI = \int\limits_{L} (y+z)dx + (z^{2}-x^{2}+y)dy + (x^{2}+y^{2})dz = \int\limits_{L+L_{1}} (y+z) \text{d}x + (z^{2}-x^{2}+y) \text{d}y + (x^{2}+y^{2}) \text{d}z = \iint\limits_{\Sigma} \begin{vmatrix} \text{d}y\text{d}z & \text{d}z\text{d}x & \text{d}x\text{d}y \\ \dfrac{\partial}{\partial x} & \dfrac{\partial}{\partial y} & \dfrac{\partial}{\partial z} \\ y+z & z^{2}-x^{2}+y & x^{2}+y^{2} \end{vmatrix} = \iint\limits_{\Sigma} (2y-2z) \text{d}y\text{d}z + (1-2x) \text{d}z\text{d}x + (-1-2x) \text{d}x\text{d}yI=L∫​(y+z)dx+(z2−x2+y)dy+(x2+y2)dz=L+L1​∫​(y+z)dx+(z2−x2+y)dy+(x2+y2)dz=Σ∬​​dydz∂x∂​y+z​dzdx∂y∂​z2−x2+y​dxdy∂z∂​x2+y2​​=Σ∬​(2y−2z)dydz+(1−2x)dzdx+(−1−2x)dxdy 其中 Σ\SigmaΣ 为 L+L1L+L_{1}L+L1​ 所围闭合曲面, 取下侧 下计算第二类曲面积分 (直接利用公式代入), 其中 DDD 为 2x2+y2=2,I=∬D(1+2y)dxdy=∬Ddxdy=22π2x^{2}+y^{2}=2, I = \iint\limits_{D} (1+2y) \text{d}x\text{d}y = \iint\limits_{D} \text{d}x\text{d}y = \dfrac{\sqrt{2}}{2} \pi2x2+y2=2,I=D∬​(1+2y)dxdy=D∬​dxdy=22​​π (其中由奇偶性得 ∬D2ydxdy=0\iint\limits_{D} 2y \text{d}x\text{d}y = 0D∬​2ydxdy=0) 方法二: 曲线 LLL 投影到 xOyxOyxOy 面上的平面曲线方程为: C1:{2x2+y2=2z=0(−2<y<2)C_{1} : \begin{cases} 2x^{2}+y^{2}=2 \\ z=0 \end{cases} (-\sqrt{2} < y < \sqrt{2})C1​:{2x2+y2=2z=0​(−2​<y<2​) 即为椭圆的下半椭圆, 从点 (0,2)→(0,−2)(0, \sqrt{2}) \to (0, -\sqrt{2})(0,2​)→(0,−2​), 下面要么用参数方程 (即方法三), 要么是补线用格林公式, 因为参数方程方法三会介绍, 所以可以直接用补线用格林公式了. 补线 C2C_{2}C2​ 在 xOyxOyxOy 面上 yyy 轴从点 (0,−2)→(0,2)(0, -\sqrt{2}) \to (0, \sqrt{2})(0,−2​)→(0,2​), 则 I=∫L(y+z)dx+(z2−x2+y)dy+(x2+y2)dz=∫C1(x2+y2+y+x)dx+ydyI = \int_{L} (y+z) \text{d}x + (z^{2}-x^{2}+y) \text{d}y + (x^{2}+y^{2}) \text{d}z = \int_{C_{1}} (x^{2}+y^{2}+y+x) \text{d}x + y \text{d}yI=∫L​(y+z)dx+(z2−x2+y)dy+(x2+y2)dz=∫C1​​(x2+y2+y+x)dx+ydy (注: z=xz=xz=x 代入即可) =∫C1+C2(x2+y2+y+x)dx+ydy−∫C2(x2+y2+y+x)dx+ydy= \int_{C_{1}+C_{2}} (x^{2}+y^{2}+y+x) \text{d}x + y \text{d}y - \int_{C_{2}} (x^{2}+y^{2}+y+x) \text{d}x + y \text{d}y=∫C1​+C2​​(x2+y2+y+x)dx+ydy−∫C2​​(x2+y2+y+x)dx+ydy 而 ∫C2(x2+y2+y+x)dx+ydy=0\int_{C_{2}} (x^{2}+y^{2}+y+x) \text{d}x + y \text{d}y = 0∫C2​​(x2+y2+y+x)dx+ydy=0 故由格林公式得 I=∬D(1+2y)dxdy=∬Ddxdy=22πI = \iint\limits_{D} (1+2y) \text{d}x\text{d}y = \iint\limits_{D} \text{d}x\text{d}y = \dfrac{\sqrt{2}}{2} \piI=D∬​(1+2y)dxdy=D∬​dxdy=22​​π 方法三: 由题意假设参数方程 {x=cos⁡θy=2sin⁡θz=cos⁡θ,θ:π2→−π2\begin{cases} x = \cos \theta \\ y = \sqrt{2} \sin \theta \\ z = \cos \theta \end{cases}, \theta : \dfrac{\pi}{2} \to -\dfrac{\pi}{2}⎩⎨⎧​x=cosθy=2​sinθz=cosθ​,θ:2π​→−2π​, ∫π2−π2[−(−2sin⁡θ+cos⁡θ)sin⁡θ+2sin⁡θcos⁡θ+(1+sin⁡2θ)sin⁡θ]dθ=∫π2−π2[−2sin⁡2θ+cos⁡θsin⁡θ+(1+sin⁡2θ)sin⁡θ]dθ=22∫0π2[sin⁡2θ]dθ=22π\int_{\dfrac{\pi}{2}}^{-\dfrac{\pi}{2}} \left[ -(-\sqrt{2} \sin \theta + \cos \theta) \sin \theta + 2 \sin \theta \cos \theta + (1 + \sin^{2} \theta) \sin \theta \right] d\theta = \int_{\dfrac{\pi}{2}}^{-\dfrac{\pi}{2}} \left[ -\sqrt{2} \sin^{2} \theta + \cos \theta \sin \theta + (1 + \sin^{2} \theta) \sin \theta \right] d\theta = 2\sqrt{2} \int_{0}^{\dfrac{\pi}{2}} \left[ \sin^{2} \theta \right] d\theta = \dfrac{\sqrt{2}}{2} \pi∫2π​−2π​​[−(−2​sinθ+cosθ)sinθ+2sinθcosθ+(1+sin2θ)sinθ]dθ=∫2π​−2π​​[−2​sin2θ+cosθsinθ+(1+sin2θ)sinθ]dθ=22​∫02π​​[sin2θ]dθ=22​​π

(2020 数一) 设 Σ\SigmaΣ 为曲面 z=x2+y2(1≤x2+y2≤4)z = \sqrt{x^{2}+y^{2}} (1 \le x^{2}+y^{2} \le 4)z=x2+y2​(1≤x2+y2≤4) 的下侧, f(x)f(x)f(x) 是连续函数, 计算 I=∬Σ[xf(xy)+2x−y]dydz+[yf(xy)+2y+x]dzdx+[zf(xy)+z]dxdy.I = \iint\limits_{\Sigma} [xf(xy)+2x-y] \text{d}y\text{d}z + [yf(xy)+2y+x] \text{d}z\text{d}x + [zf(xy)+z] \text{d}x\text{d}y.I=Σ∬​[xf(xy)+2x−y]dydz+[yf(xy)+2y+x]dzdx+[zf(xy)+z]dxdy.

答案方法一: 由 z=x2+y2z = \sqrt{x^{2}+y^{2}}z=x2+y2​ 得 x2+y2−z2=0x^{2}+y^{2}-z^{2}=0x2+y2−z2=0, Σ\SigmaΣ 的法向量为 (x,y,−z)(x, y, -z)(x,y,−z), 方向余弦为 cos⁡α=xx2+y2+z2=x2(x2+y2)\cos \alpha = \dfrac{x}{\sqrt{x^{2}+y^{2}+z^{2}}} = \dfrac{x}{\sqrt{2(x^{2}+y^{2})}}cosα=x2+y2+z2​x​=2(x2+y2)​x​, cos⁡β=y2(x2+y2)\cos \beta = \dfrac{y}{\sqrt{2(x^{2}+y^{2})}}cosβ=2(x2+y2)​y​, cos⁡γ=−z2(x2+y2)\cos \gamma = \dfrac{-z}{\sqrt{2(x^{2}+y^{2})}}cosγ=2(x2+y2)​−z​, 由两类曲面积分的关系得 I=∬Σ{[xf(xy)+2x−y]cos⁡α+[yf(xy)+2y+x]cos⁡β+[zf(xy)+z]cos⁡γ}dS=12∬Σx2+y2dSI = \iint\limits_{\Sigma} \{ [xf(xy)+2x-y] \cos \alpha + [yf(xy)+2y+x] \cos \beta + [zf(xy)+z] \cos \gamma \} dS = \dfrac{1}{\sqrt{2}} \iint\limits_{\Sigma} \sqrt{x^{2}+y^{2}} dSI=Σ∬​{[xf(xy)+2x−y]cosα+[yf(xy)+2y+x]cosβ+[zf(xy)+z]cosγ}dS=2​1​Σ∬​x2+y2​dS, 记 D={(x,y)∣1≤x2+y2≤4}D = \{ (x, y) \mid 1 \le x^{2}+y^{2} \le 4 \}D={(x,y)∣1≤x2+y2≤4}, 由于 zx′2+zy′2+1=(xx2+y2)2+(yx2+y2)2+1=2\sqrt{z_{x}'^{2}+z_{y}'^{2}+1} = \sqrt{\left( \dfrac{x}{\sqrt{x^{2}+y^{2}}} \right)^{2} + \left( \dfrac{y}{\sqrt{x^{2}+y^{2}}} \right)^{2} + 1} = \sqrt{2}zx′2​+zy′2​+1​=(x2+y2​x​)2+(x2+y2​y​)2+1​=2​, 所以 I=∬Dx2+y2dxdy=∫02πdθ∫12r2dr=14π3.I = \iint\limits_{D} \sqrt{x^{2}+y^{2}} dxdy = \int_{0}^{2\pi} d\theta \int_{1}^{2} r^{2} dr = \dfrac{14\pi}{3}.I=D∬​x2+y2​dxdy=∫02π​dθ∫12​r2dr=314π​. 方法二: 由 z=x2+y2z = \sqrt{x^{2}+y^{2}}z=x2+y2​, 得 zx′=xx2+y2,zy′=yx2+y2z_{x}' = \dfrac{x}{\sqrt{x^{2}+y^{2}}}, z_{y}' = \dfrac{y}{\sqrt{x^{2}+y^{2}}}zx′​=x2+y2​x​,zy′​=x2+y2​y​, 由公式 I=∬ΣPdydz+Qdzdx+Rdxdy=∬Σ[P(−zx′)+Q(−zy′)+R]dxdyI = \iint\limits_{\Sigma} Pdydz + Qdzdx + Rdxdy = \iint\limits_{\Sigma} [P(-z_{x}') + Q(-z_{y}') + R] dxdyI=Σ∬​Pdydz+Qdzdx+Rdxdy=Σ∬​[P(−zx′​)+Q(−zy′​)+R]dxdy, 得 I=∬Σ{[xf(xy)+2x−y](−xx2+y2)+[yf(xy)+2y+x](−yx2+y2)+[zf(xy)+z]}dxdy=−∬Σx2+y2dxdyI = \iint\limits_{\Sigma} \{ [xf(xy)+2x-y] (-\dfrac{x}{\sqrt{x^{2}+y^{2}}}) + [yf(xy)+2y+x] (-\dfrac{y}{\sqrt{x^{2}+y^{2}}}) + [zf(xy)+z] \} dxdy = -\iint\limits_{\Sigma} \sqrt{x^{2}+y^{2}} dxdyI=Σ∬​{[xf(xy)+2x−y](−x2+y2​x​)+[yf(xy)+2y+x](−x2+y2​y​)+[zf(xy)+z]}dxdy=−Σ∬​x2+y2​dxdy, 记 D={(x,y)∣1≤x2+y2≤4}D = \{ (x, y) \mid 1 \le x^{2}+y^{2} \le 4 \}D={(x,y)∣1≤x2+y2≤4}, 则 I=∬Dx2+y2dxdy=∫02πdθ∫12r2dr=14π3.I = \iint\limits_{D} \sqrt{x^{2}+y^{2}} dxdy = \int_{0}^{2\pi} d\theta \int_{1}^{2} r^{2} dr = \dfrac{14\pi}{3}.I=D∬​x2+y2​dxdy=∫02π​dθ∫12​r2dr=314π​.

(2024 数一) 已知有向曲线 LLL 为球面 x2+y2+z2=2xx^{2}+y^{2}+z^{2}=2xx2+y2+z2=2x 与平面 2x−z−1=02x-z-1=02x−z−1=0 的交线, 从 zzz 轴正向往 zzz 轴负向看过去为逆时针方向, 计算曲线积分 ∫L(6xyz−yz2)dx+2x2zdy+xyzdz.\int_{L} (6xyz-yz^{2}) \text{d}x + 2x^{2}z \text{d}y + xyz \text{d}z.∫L​(6xyz−yz2)dx+2x2zdy+xyzdz.

答案三维降到二维计算, 则 LLL 投影到 xOyxOyxOy 面上为椭圆 CCC (联立消去 zzz 即可) (x−35)2425+y245=1\dfrac{\left(x-\dfrac{3}{5}\right)^{2}}{\dfrac{4}{25}} + \dfrac{y^{2}}{\dfrac{4}{5}} = 1254​(x−53​)2​+54​y2​=1, 取逆时针方向, 则 z=2x−1z=2x-1z=2x−1 代入 I=∫L(6xyz−yz2)dx+2x2zdy+xyzdzI = \int\limits_{L} (6xyz-yz^{2}) \text{d}x + 2x^{2}z \text{d}y + xyz \text{d}zI=L∫​(6xyz−yz2)dx+2x2zdy+xyzdz 得 I=∫C(12x2−4xy−y)dx+(4x3−2x2)dy=∬DdxdyI = \int\limits_{C} (12x^{2}-4xy-y) \text{d}x + (4x^{3}-2x^{2}) \text{d}y = \iint\limits_{D} \text{d}x\text{d}yI=C∫​(12x2−4xy−y)dx+(4x3−2x2)dy=D∬​dxdy (格林公式) =SD=π⋅25⋅25=4π55= S_{D} = \pi \cdot \dfrac{2}{5} \cdot \dfrac{2}{\sqrt{5}} = \dfrac{4\pi}{5\sqrt{5}}=SD​=π⋅52​⋅5​2​=55​4π​ 注: 本题也可以直接用斯托克斯公式, 但是还是直接降到二维比较方便, 因为斯托克斯最后还要投影到 xOyxOyxOy 面上.
